Content Title: DJ Patil on Data Science: The Ask Me Anything Conversations
Content Description: DJ Patil—the former United States Chief Data Scientist—boasts a unique perspective on the future, risks, and all-around power of data. In addition to shaping policies at the White House, he's authored influential academic papers and served as head of data products at LinkedIn, where he helped to coin the term "data scientist." In this single-course compilation of the popular weekly series, DJ tackles questions posed by LinkedIn members, diving into topics ranging from data security to the future of data science.

Content Title: Introduction to Prompt Engineering for Generative AI (2023)
Content Description: If you are a beginner looking to learn more about Natural Language Processing (NLP) capabilities or a developer wanting to get started with modern NLP APIs, this course offers a great introduction. Software developer and instructor Ronnie Sheer guides you through what large language models are and what problems they may be able to solve. Ronnie dives into text generation, starting with a warning to use text generation AI responsibly, then moving on to Chat GPT, GPT-3, and J1 with few-shot learning. He introduces you to the AI generated image landscape, then shows you how to use Dall-E and Midjourney. Plus, Ronnie goes over a couple of advanced concepts, like how to fine tune your prompts and how to interact with language models using an API.

Content Title: Generative AI for Marketing Professionals
Content Description:
Are you looking to supercharge your marketing skills and leverage generative AI on your next campaign? In this course from Pearson, join instructor Tim Warner as he shows you how to elevate your marketing strategy by creating high-impact content, engaging customers through AI-driven platforms, and automating repetitive tasks. Along the way, Tim covers leading tools including Jasper, Salesforce Einstein AI, Google Gemini, Claude, and ChatGPT, providing real-world techniques along the way to highlight how to leverage generative AI more effectively. By the end of this course, you’ll be equipped with practical skills to transform and optimize your marketing outcomes.

This course was created by Pearson. We are pleased to host this training in our library.

Content Title: Resume Tips for Leaders and Managers
Content Description:
Are you looking for a new job as a manager, but not sure what to do with your resume? Join instructor and professional resume writer Sarah Johnston in this approachable executive skills course. Follow along as she introduces you to practical strategies to create a stand-out resume, with tips that you can put to use the next time you’re interviewing for a new role.

Get started by outlining the unique features of a leadership and management skills-based resume. Find out how to articulate your strengths on the page to craft a branding message that’s targeted for the role. Sarah gives you pointers on sharing your accomplishments and showcasing your talents as a leader, guiding you through everything you need to know to design a memorable, eye-catching, and error-free professional resume.

Content Title: Maîtriser Excel par la pratique
Content Description: Si vous devez utiliser Excel au quotidien, ce cours est fait pour vous. À travers des exemples précis, Martial Auroy vous guide dans l'utilisation d'Excel et vous donne ses meilleures astuces. Vous aborderez ensemble des thèmes comme l’ajustement de vos impressions, la zone d’impression, les tableaux croisés dynamiques, la mise en forme conditionnelle, etc. Vous saurez ainsi, à la fin de cette formation très complète, comment vous organiser, gérer votre classeur, calculer, manipuler du texte et passer des éléments en tableau et même imprimer et exporter !

Content Title: Motiver une équipe à distance
Content Description: Découvrez cette formation audio sur comment motiver une équipe qui travaille en remote. Flavie Prévot, ancienne dirigeante en grand groupe, vous présente le contenu de ce cours. Après avoir managé de grandes équipes et cofondé un collectif pour réaliser des managements à distance, elle puise dans ses nombreuses années d'expérience pour vous proposer des outils efficaces et des méthodes concrètes. Ce cours va vous permettre de mieux communiquer, de mobiliser vos équipes et de souder vos collaborateurs à distance. </br></br> Cette formation a été créée par Flavie Prévot. Nous sommes ravis d'héberger ce contenu sur notre plateforme.

Content Title: Social Media Video for Business and Marketing
Content Description: In the world of business and marketing, well-planned and well-executed social media videos are more important than ever. But not all videos are the same. Each type of video is a specific tool, and it’s important to use these tools in the right ways to achieve the best results. In this course, senior staff instructor Ashley Kennedy provides a thorough introduction to the role of video in social media marketing campaigns—and discusses how to best leverage video in your overall content strategy. She then delivers a rundown of the top types of social media videos, including explainers, vlogs, product videos, interviews, long-form content, and more. After watching this course, you'll be familiar with various video strategies and prepared to learn more about how to create each type of video.

Content Title: Ten Micro-Impressions to Make in an Interview
Content Description: A successful interview isn't just about making an impression, but rather about making a series of the right impressions—consciously or subconsciously—at a micro level. It may sound overwhelming, but you can make all of the right impressions as a candidate if you plan for it as part of your overall interview preparation strategy. Unlock the secret to entering an interview without feeling burdened by a checklist of required first impressions. Gather insights from instructor Scott Mautz on altering and supplementing your interview prep to ensure the impressions you want to make are made naturally. As you progress through the course, Scott offers wisdom drawn from over ten years of professional experience leading a high-producing recruiting team to help you set the stage for interview success.

Content Title: Arrêter de fumer
Content Description: Cette formation de Christophe Cutarella va vous aider à comprendre et à surmonter l'addiction au tabac. Vous y apprendrez les bases de la dépendance, l'inégalité face aux addictions, quels sont les réseaux de soin et l'historique du tabagisme. Vous découvrirez comment gérer le craving, adapter votre mode de vie, prévenir et traiter les rechutes, et utiliser des substituts nicotiniques. Vous aborderez également le sevrage, les substituts, la gestion de la prise de poids, l'efficacité et les risques de la vape, tout en démystifiant les idées reçues sur le tabac et la vape.

Content Title: Design Your First Infographic
Content Description: Infographics distill information into a digestible, picture-driven format that viewers can easily retain. Whether you wish to design your first infographic for a marketing report, a personal project, a company brochure, or an event, this course walks you through the very first steps. No prior knowledge of infographic design is needed. Instructor Nigel French helps you identify when a graphic representation is better than a written one, and he goes over the fundamental design aspects of infographics such as icons and font choices. Plus, learn where to find sources of inspiration and raw material—including accurate data—for your infographic.

Content Title: L'analyse de données avec l'IA générative
Content Description: Avec Vincent Terrasi, plongez dans l'analyse de données avec l'IA générative. D'abord, vous acquerrez les prérequis essentiels, les nouveaux outils et la compréhension des projets de data science. Vous apprendrez à préparer les données en les nettoyant et les transformant avec l'IA, ainsi qu'à choisir et optimiser les modèles d'IA pour des applications variées telles que la prédiction des ventes ou l'optimisation des campagnes marketing. À travers des études de cas, vous découvrirez comment des entreprises utilisent l'IA pour analyser les données, les défis rencontrés, et les solutions proposées. Enfin, vous explorerez les tendances futures en IA et en analyse de données.

Content Title: Writing with Impact
Content Description: There's no such thing as generic "good" writing. Writing quality—and impact—comes from how well it fits its purpose. This course shows how to give all your writing more impact, regardless of its purpose. Writer and journalist Tom Geller helps you find your own reasons for writing, demonstrating how to use those reasons to drive the words you choose and the tone you take. Plus, he shares how to leverage your understanding of grammar and sentence structure to write nearly anything with maximum impact. Upon completing this course, you'll be equipped with practical tips for making your prose clear, concise, and right for its specific purpose.

Content Title: SEO: Optimize Your Social Media Profiles
Content Description:
Social media marketing can help you to build a community of followers who grow to know, like, trust, and advocate your brand. In this course, social media SEO expert Sam Dey details how to build an SEO strategy for your social media marketing activities and positively impact your company’s overall visibility within major search engines.

Sam covers opportunities to thoughtfully leverage important aspects of social media, including building authority, social bookmarking websites, and content creation. He highlights the important role that social media plays in relation to SEO, as well as how to effectively optimize social media profiles for increased visibility, followers, and engagement. Sam also covers SEO best practices for short-form content on TikTok, Instagram, and YouTube. Build the SEO strategy for your social media marketing efforts with the concrete actions outlined in this course.

Content Title: Making Recruiters Come to You with J.T. O'Donnell
Content Description: Learn what recruiters look for, and how to help them find you. J.T. O'Donnell is a LinkedIn Top Voice and an expert on the modern job search and recruiting. She helps job seekers make the most of their time by teaching them to attract recruiters, instead of applying endlessly to online applications. In this course, she’ll help you master using LinkedIn, understand the role of your resume and cover letters in the job search process, and uncover the best ways to connect and follow up with a recruiter.

Content Title: The Data Science of Healthcare, Medicine, and Public Health
Content Description: Data analytics plays an increasingly pivotal role in how we go about managing our healthcare systems and personal health. This nontechnical course explores a variety of ways to apply data science to medicine and public health. Data scientist Barton Poulson discusses the ways that dramatically increased quantities of data—from genetic testing, genealogy, brain scans, and other sources—are changing the theory and practice of healthcare. As he looks over key data sources, Barton explores the different methods for analyzing this wealth of data, including machine learning and predictive modeling. He also details the extraordinary effect of the COVID-19 pandemic on the ways data is used in healthcare, and details how data science has changed the areas of patient care, self-care, and medical insurance. Barton also looks at some challenges the increased use of data presents, from ethical questions to logistical implementations, and how data science can help identify unanticipated problems.

Content Title: Stratégies de leadership pour les femmes
Content Description: De nombreuses sources décrivent les difficultés auxquelles les femmes sont confrontées pour atteindre le tiers supérieur des entreprises actuelles. Pour créer un environnement d’« excellence inclusive » dans lequel femmes et hommes peuvent s’épanouir, des compétences et une stratégie adaptées sont nécessaires. Cette formation s’adresse à tous ceux qui souhaitent développer une culture plus équitable et collaborative au sein de leur entreprise. Daisy L. Lovelace et Carolyn Goerner parlent des difficultés courantes auxquelles les femmes qui occupent des postes de direction sont confrontées et proposent des stratégies pour les surmonter. Elles donnent également des conseils pour défendre le leadership des femmes et devenir un bon allié.

Content Title: The Three Pillars of Effective Communication
Content Description:
Effective communication starts with presence. Strong presence builds trust. A lack of presence erodes it. But what is presence, really? In this Knowable audio course, Ximena Vengoechea, author of Listen Like You Mean It: Reclaiming the Lost Art of True Connection, teaches you to become a more confident, trustworthy, and successful communicator by unlocking the three key skills of conversational presence: self-awareness, trust, and patience. Ximena shows you how to take control of your emotions through the process known as “labeling,” regulate your physical self by running a “body scan,” avoid distractions caused by unnecessary detail-orientation, and build greater rapport with others by saying less.

Note: This course was created by Knowable. We are pleased to host this training in our library.

Content Title: L'anglais des affaires : Grammaire et vocabulaire pour les réunions (en anglais)
Content Description: Vous souhaitez vous présenter avec assurance en anglais lors de réunions et communiquer avec aisance ? Alors suivez ce cours ! Toutes les étapes clés y seront abordées, de la phase de préparation à la phase de clôture de la réunion. Tom Winters vous partagera du vocabulaire et des expressions qui vous permettront de faire preuve de professionnalisme et de vous exprimer avec clarté et précision ! Vous verrez ensuite comment les employer en contexte, grâce à des exemples concrets. Enfin, vous aurez l’occasion de réviser les termes appris grâce à des exercices de répétition. </br></br> Cette formation a été créée par Speexx. Nous sommes ravis d'héberger ce contenu sur notre plateforme.

Content Title: Excel : Les fonctions RECHERCHEX et EQUIVX (Microsoft 365)
Content Description: Si vous utilisez Excel et Microsoft 365, cette formation est pour vous. Martial Auroy, intervenant pour FMP Formation14 et spécialiste en outils de bureautique, vous explique comment utiliser la puissance de RECHERCHEX et d'EQUIVX pour exploiter vos listes de données. Vous allez découvrir les paramètres de ces fonctions pour optimiser vos classeurs et les rendre plus performants. Vous allez aborder des exemples de solutions, aller plus loin vers la maîtrise d'Excel et trouver ce que vous recherchiez, plus simplement.

Content Title: Découvrir Power BI avec ChatGPT
Content Description: Benjamin Ejzenberg vous propose, dans cette formation, de maîtriser Power BI, la solution d'analyse de données de Microsoft, en le combinant avec ChatGPT, l'agent conversationnel d'OpenAI. Vous comprendrez comment utiliser ces outils conjointement, en suivant les étapes d'un projet Power BI. Vous découvrirez comment importer, transformer et profiler les données. Puis, vous apprendrez à les modéliser, à créer des visualisations pertinentes, et à obtenir des conseils pour améliorer vos compétences en data visualisation. Et vous pourrez même simuler des entretiens d'embauche avec ChatGPT !

Content Title: Excel : Les tableaux croisés dynamiques - Astuces rapides
Content Description: Martial Auroy, formateur spécialisé Microsoft Office 365, vous guide dans la création d’un outil puissant d’Excel : le tableau croisé dynamique. Le TCD vous permet de synthétiser des données, de mettre en évidence des tendances ou encore de créer des rapports de données rapides et précieux, et cela en quelques minutes seulement. Il peut également être très utile comme support pour partager des informations lors d’une réunion. Dans ce cours, vous découvrirez les différentes étapes ainsi que des astuces pour créer rapidement un tableau croisé dynamique de qualité.

Content Title: Synthétiser son discours à l'écrit comme à l'oral
Content Description: Vous a-t-on déjà reproché de trop en dire ou de vous perdre dans les détails ? Vous sentez-vous bien plus à l'aise dans l'analyse que dans la synthèse ? Si vos réponses sont affirmatives, cette formation est pour vous. Afin de faire face à ces difficultés, notamment en situation professionnelle, Nicolas Bonnefoix, expert en communication et auteur, vous donne les clés pour révéler un autre portrait de vous-même. Vous allez adopter des outils efficaces pour vous exprimer de façon claire, précise et concise. Ainsi, vous serez en mesure de structurer votre discours pour aller « droit au but » autant à l'écrit qu'à l'oral.

Content Title: Excel : Formules et fonctions avancées  - Astuces rapides (Microsoft 365)
Content Description: Utiliser Excel et ses fonctions intégrées peut paraître compliqué et long et vous ne savez pas toujours par où commencer. Dans ce cours, partez à la découverte d’Excel avec Martial Auroy, formateur spécialisé Microsoft 365 pour FMP Formation14. Il vous présentera les bases d’Excel mais également les fonctions et les formules avancées principales. Grâce à des exemples simples et rapides, vous verrez comment gagner en efficacité dans Excel. Martial Auroy vous donnera également des astuces précieuses pour aller plus loin.

Content Title: Speaking Confidently and Effectively
Content Description:
The ability to present yourself and communicate well is crucial in any work environment. In this course, adapted from the podcast How to Be Awesome at Your Job, learn how to build on your presentation skills to gain a competitive advantage in your career. Professional speaker Diane DiResta shares tips and tricks for leveling up your presentations and boosting your executive presence. Learn how to craft your presentations around what’s important to the audience to ensure that you're only sharing the most impactful information. Discover how to shift your focus away from yourself to conquer your fear of speaking. Plus, get strategies for ensuring that your body, tone, and words are giving off one consistent message; planning for your worst-case scenario and establishing recovery strategies; handling tough questions; and more.

This course was created by Pete Mockaitis of How to Be Awesome at Your Job. We are pleased to offer this training in our library.

Content Title: Organizational Learning and Development
Content Description:
If you want to attract and retain top talent, you need to provide results-driven opportunities for your employees to learn and grow. Learning and development (L&D) programs have become a critical talent management tool for many organizations, helping leaders, managers, and recruiters build their talent pipelines by curating the conditions for learning success.

In this course, industry leader and skills strategist Gina Jeneroux shows you how to take a more disciplined view of learning measurement at your organization to meet the learning needs of today’s ever-changing workplace. Learn how to manage the business of learning by adopting the perspective of a strategic enabler, upskilling your employees for today and tomorrow, following best practices for effective learning, and developing your technology and data ecosystem more deliberately using the power of the SkillsEngine.

Content Title: Marketing Communications
Content Description: In today's media landscape, consumers decide how and when they want to receive information. As a result, it's crucial for marketers to have a robust understanding of how to design and execute a marketing plan that resonates with audiences—as well as how to measure the results. In this course, learn how to chart your own marketing roadmap. Join marketing expert Deirdre Breakenridge as she explains how to research your marketing communication needs, craft a marketing plan that helps you connect with your audience, and leverage PR, social media, and email marketing strategies. Plus, she discusses how to launch your campaign, and track your program through a measurement dashboard.

Content Title: Illustrator 2025 Essential Training
Content Description:
Illustrator can be used to accomplish many different design tasks. For this reason, Illustrator Essential Training teaches core concepts and techniques that can be applied to any workflow for print, the web, or assets that will find their way into other applications. In this course, Tony Harmer explains the elements that make up Illustrator documents, including artboards, basic shapes, and more. Tony discusses vector graphics—paths, strokes, and fills—and shows how to use each of the drawing tools within Illustrator. He demonstrates how to transform, combine and clean up paths, as well as organizing elements into groups and layers. Tony also covers text editing, working with color, expressive brush drawing, effects, and much more. Exercise files accompany this course.

This course is part of a Professional Certificate from Adobe.

Content Title: Elearning Tips
Content Description: Are you a learning professional looking to improve your development process and create better elearning? Elearning designer and author Tim Slade offers quick tips that can be immediately applied to your design process. Find out how to draft preliminary storyboards to explore your ideas, develop prototypes to test your functionality and visualize your look and feel, design more engaging and visually interesting courses, and add interactivity that gives learners a chance to practice and validate their skills.  These tips are designed to be used by all elearning creators, regardless of the platform you create content on. Focus on the techniques that interest you, or use them in combination to save time and build a better end product for your learners.

Content Title: Establishing Your Leadership Brand
Content Description:
As a leader, it’s easy to forget to dedicate time to something like your brand with everything else going on. In this course, leadership and training coach Audrey Daniels gives you the supplies needed to bring your leadership brand and personality sparkle back to life. Audrey focuses on what makes you tick and helps you define your expertise to help you succeed professionally and personally. She shows you how to rebuild your confidence and use self-doubt to your advantage. She also provides key strategies you can use to build your leadership brand. Knowing your leadership brand will help you positively engage with an audience and stand out as a servant leader to a team. Learn how to network, share your methods with other leaders, and even explore the importance of self-evaluation. Join Audrey in this course to learn more about the components of your leadership brand and how to apply them for long-term success.

This course was created by Madecraft. We are pleased to host this training in our library.

Content Title: Making Messages Memorable
Content Description: In today's digital-first world, clear and impactful communication is essential. In this course, Karin Reed shares her expertise in crafting and delivering messages that stand out. Karin shares how to define your message's purpose, simplify content, and connect emotionally with your audience. Discover effective storytelling techniques for truly memorable content. After completing this course, you'll have the tools to leave a lasting impression and craft messages that stick.

Content Title: Sustainability Strategies
Content Description: A changing climate compels us to change the way we do business. Incorporating sustainability into your business can help your bottom line and build your company's brand. This course shows how to adopt smart sustainability practices to drive financial performance, attract and retain employees, and protect your company's license to operate. David Bennell outlines how to establish your reputation as a company focused on sustainability, manage supply chains more responsibly and effectively, create sustainable products and services, and reduce energy use, waste, toxic substances, and emissions. Last, he helps you figure out how to track key metrics, assess your company's carbon footprint, and improve your environmental, social, and governance (ESG) practices.

Content Title: Visual Studio : L'intégration du contrôle de source avec Git
Content Description: Que vous soyez développeur ou utilisateur de Git, débutant comme expérimenté, suivez cette formation sur son intégration dans Visual Studio 2022, la dernière version de la boîte à outils de développement de Microsoft. Après avoir procédé, avec votre formatrice Nina Kapinga, aux configurations et aux authentifications, vous mettrez en place un workflow Git, que vous apprendrez, au fur et à mesure de la formation, à automatiser. Vous aborderez également la gestion des référentiels et, bien entendu, la configuration des préférences Git et Visual Studio.

Content Title: 10 astuces nano pour décupler ta productivité sur Excel
Content Description:
Dans cette courte et très dynamique formation de Jean-Baptiste Caverne, vous découvrirez dix astuces qui vous faciliteront la vie avec Excel, l'incontournable tableur de Microsoft. Ainsi, vous verrez comment répartir des données d'une colonne en deux colonnes, comment supprimer des lignes vides aisément, comment exploiter la fonction RECHERCHEX et la fonction SEQUENCE, comment répéter les données et effectuer un remplissage automatique, ou encore tirer parti de la mise en forme conditionnelle, des tableaux et graphiques croisés dynamiques ou filtrer des données en insérant un segment.</br></br>

Cette formation a été créée par Jean-Baptiste Caverne. Nous sommes ravis d'héberger ce contenu sur notre plateforme.

Content Title: Automate Your Workflows with Generative AI
Content Description: Does your workflow need a boost? Generative AI not only automates tasks but also enhances decision-making and efficiency. In this course, workflow consultant Tamera Franklin guides you through the essentials of integrating AI into your business processes. Learn to leverage generative AI capabilities and train it for your specific needs. After this course, you'll be ready to use AI to transform your daily operations and enhance your productivity.

Content Title: Nano Tips for Negotiating Your Salary with Sho Dewan
Content Description:
Welcome to our Nano Tips series, where LinkedIn Learning creators deliver impactful lessons in literally seconds. In this installment, discover the secrets to navigating a successful salary negotiation, with key insights from Sho Dewan, the CEO and founder of Workhap and a LinkedIn Top Voice in Job Search and Careers.

Learn the essentials of talking about salary so you know what to say when it counts. Find out how to research salaries, work closely with recruiters, share your salary expectations, and consider your compensation package beyond just the numbers. Sho walks you through the three most important things to know before you even start the negotiation, with pointers on how to make a counteroffer that’s fair to you and competitive with the market. Along the way, Sho also tells what to say when you’re ready to ask for a raise.

Content Title: Préparer son entretien d'embauche
Content Description: Vous avez réussi l'épreuve de la recherche d'offres et passé le barrage de la sélection du CV et de la lettre de motivation. L'entretien est la dernière étape avant l'emploi. Pour bien préparer votre entretien professionnel, il faut savoir à quoi vous attendre et connaître les attentes du recruteur. Cette formation d'Ingrid Pieronne s'adresse à toutes les personnes qui souhaitent optimiser leurs chances pour réussir leurs entretiens d'embauche. Vous y trouverez des conseils pour organiser votre préparation, mettre en avant vos compétences et montrer la concordance de votre candidature avec le poste proposé et l'entreprise. Quel que soit le poste recherché, le niveau de compétences, votre qualification ou votre âge, vous serez prêt à affronter tous types d'entretien. C'est en vous préparant correctement que vous allez pouvoir faire la différence face à tous les autres candidats.

Content Title: Generative AI for Small Businesses
Content Description:
Generative AI is a transformative tool that can elevate your small business to new heights. In this course, Laxmi Harikumar—a generative AI engineer and expert data scientist—shares her extensive knowledge on generative AI, including essential tools and strategies that small businesses can use. Find out how to unlock operational efficiency through the identification and automation of repetitive tasks and processes. Dive into the use of generative AI for monitoring and enhancing your business's financial health. Plus, go over effective generative AI strategies for optimizing marketing and branding efforts. In the concluding sections, learn how to leverage generative AI to expand your customer base, while always considering the ethical implications of employing such technology in the workplace. When you complete this course, you will possess the skills to ethically utilize generative AI for automations, content creation, business planning, website development, and financial management.

This course was created by Madecraft. We are pleased to host this training in our library.

Content Title: Devenir une personne charismatique et influente
Content Description: Dans cette formation de Yann Piette, vous allez apprendre à développer votre charisme. Ainsi, vous verrez comment améliorer votre posture, poser votre regard et utiliser vos mains. Vous travaillerez également votre voix, à l'aide d'exercices faciles à réaliser chez soi, ainsi que la manière de vous tenir, d'occuper l'espace et de vous exprimer correctement et, surtout, au bon rythme. Tout cela vous demandera quelques efforts ainsi que des changements d'habitude, mais qui finiront par être payants. </br> Cette formation a été créée par Yann Piette. Nous sommes ravis d'héberger ce contenu sur notre plateforme.

Content Title: Copilot in Excel: Supercharge Your Productivity
Content Description: Imagine being able to create sophisticated Excel spreadsheets and charts—and quickly glean insights for your stakeholders—using nothing more than a simple chat prompt. With Microsoft 365 Copilot, which brings the power of large language models (LLMs) to your favorite productivity apps, this can be your reality today. Join Jess Stratton as she shows beginners and experts alike how to use Copilot to radically simplify common Excel workflows.

Content Title: Resume Makeover
Content Description: A resume is a key tool in your job search, so how can you really make it shine? In this course, career coach Jenny Foss gives you fresh guidance on how to make over your resume: homing in on the most important message, tailoring it to the roles you plan to apply to, getting the look and content right, and leveraging generative AI as a tool to build a stellar resume. Jenny guides you through how to refine and polish your resume to get through ATS and make a great impression with recruiters and hiring managers. Plus, she coaches you on particular resume challenges, like addressing gaps and effectively framing career pivots.

Content Title: Négocier son salaire en tant que femme
Content Description: De nombreuses études relèvent le fait que les femmes sont souvent moins bien payées que les hommes. Il s'agit d'un sujet auquel nous sommes collectivement attentifs depuis plusieurs années. Dans cette formation audio de Sandrine Dorbes, vous découvrirez des conseils pour savoir négocier votre salaire en tant que femme. Vous verrez comment préparer votre entretien et comment identifier les freins que vous vous imposez parfois. Puis, vous aborderez la question de l'attitude à adopter lors de l'entretien et, bien entendu, comment poursuivre vos négociations une fois terminé.

Content Title: Utiliser l’intelligence artificielle dans sa stratégie L&D
Content Description: Découvrez comment intégrer l'intelligence artificielle dans la stratégie Learning and Development (L&D). Cette formation explore les concepts de l'IA, ses applications dans les entreprises et les outils disponibles comme l'IA générative. Elle couvre l'analyse des besoins de formation, la conception de programmes, l'optimisation post-formation et la gestion administrative. Apprenez à personnaliser les parcours d'apprentissage, à créer des capsules de formation avec les experts internes, à utiliser le coaching virtuel, et à développer des communautés apprenantes grâce à l'IA.

Content Title: Adapter sa stratégie L&D pour les générations Y et Z
Content Description: Apprenez à adapter votre stratégie Learning and Development (L&D) aux attentes des générations Y et Z. Les entreprises doivent aujourd'hui relever le défi de comprendre et de satisfaire les besoins des jeunes talents. Découvrez comment capitaliser sur les technologies modernes, proposer des dispositifs L&D adaptés, et utiliser des outils comme l'apprentissage entre pairs, les communautés apprenantes, et la réalité virtuelle. Explorez également le tutorat, le reverse mentoring, et l'intégration de l'IA pour une stratégie L&D innovante et efficace.

Content Title: Driving Employee Engagement as a People Manager
Content Description:
While every company values its products, services, technologies, and intellectual property, the most important asset of most businesses is the people who work there. Proactive, savvy people managers can make the difference between a workforce of engaged, motivated employees versus one peppered with lackluster, disinterested employees largely disconnected from their key responsibilities. In this course, corporate trainer Dana Brownlee offers specific, practical strategies that can help you engage and retain employees. Learn how to: diagnose and address individual team member engagement concerns (and distinguish between healthy and concerning disengagement drivers); challenge and reassess your own leadership expectations and behaviors; revisit team culture and adjust as needed; build connections proactively to encourage openness and willingness to share; tailor responses to individual circumstances; and identify and address poor job fit situations.

This course is part of a Professional Certificate from LinkedIn Learning.

Content Title: Recovering from a Layoff
Content Description: Learn how to recover quickly from a layoff and find employment again. Brie Reynolds begins with the first steps to take after a layoff, including making a structured recovery plan. Then she covers topics such as filling the gap in your resume, networking after a layoff, searching and applying for jobs, and interviewing for a job after you've been laid off. By the end of this course, you'll be able to develop a personalized action plan that includes adding new experiences to your resume, strategically using your professional network, pinpointing the best open jobs, and tackling difficult interview questions with confidence.

Content Title: How to Speak So People Want to Listen
Content Description:
Do you want to be an engaging speaker? In this audio-only course from How to Be Awesome at Your Job, international speaker Julian Treasure shares tactics and techniques that improve how you communicate. Julian stresses the importance of learning how to listen first. Understanding how your audience listens will improve your speaking. Julian shows you words to avoid and roadblocks to work around. If you’re more concerned about looking good or being right than you are about giving value to your audience, then your presentation won’t have any impact. Julian shows you ways to vary how you speak to keep your voice engaging. Change up your pace, tone, pitch, and volume to make your speaking more dynamic. You can also resonate your voice from your chest to sound more authoritative. Julian encourages you to keep your posture straight for more powerful speaking. Hunching prevents you from using your voice at its best. Julian concludes with the four C’s of good listening.

This course was created by Pete Mockaitis of How to Be Awesome at Your Job. We are pleased to offer this training in our library.

Content Title: Job Interviewing for Leaders and Managers
Content Description: If you think of a job interview like a test, wouldn’t it be good to go into the test knowing most of the answers? As with any test, a lack of preparation can cost you, and if you’re not prepared for an interview, it could cost you a job you’re otherwise qualified for. Interviewing is particularly important at the leadership/executive level, as there are far fewer opportunities the higher you rise. In this course, Sarah Johnston teaches you how to effectively prepare for an interview so that you can answer the most challenging and difficult questions. Sarah starts with pre-interview prep tips, like researching your audience so that you can build a strong rapport and avoid potential pitfalls. She then covers the most common types of questions asked in interviews and how to target your responses, and explains the importance of effective storytelling in your interview. Sarah also teaches effective ways to end an interview, as a last impression can be as important as the first impression.

Content Title: Get a Remote Data Science Job
Content Description:
There has never been a better time to find the balance between your work life and your personal life. In this course, recognized Python instructor and blogger Michael Galarnyk highlights the most effective ways to find a dream remote data science job. Learn how to write an effective resume, work your network, and create a data science portfolio. Go over building your online presence and finding remote job opportunities. Plus, find out how to ace your interviews, stand out remotely, and craft a productive follow-up strategy.

This course was created by Madecraft. We are pleased to host this training in our library.

Content Title: Utiliser les compétences comme un avantage compétitif
Content Description: Dans cette formation qui s'adresse aux managers et aux décideurs, vous aborderez les compétences comme un avantage compétitif pour les organisations et les entreprises. Avec Adilson Borges, vous verrez comment construire une organisation axée sur les compétences, en soulignant leurs avantages et en voyant de quelle manière elles peuvent être liées à la stratégie. Vous aborderez également l'impact sur les évolutions du business et la stratégie qui en découle, ainsi que le recrutement basé sur les compétences.

Content Title: Agentic AI Solution Communication Architectures
Content Description:
Tasks carried out by agentic AI systems can involve numerous agents that need to be able to effectively communicate with each other on an on-going basis. Furthermore, individual agents can have their own application architectures with distributed services that need to be able to efficiently exchange data. In this course, LinkedIn Top Voice and best-selling author Thomas Erl establishes key communication architectures for inter-agent and intra-agent messaging and data flow, ranging from basic synchronous data exchanges to various asynchronous messaging styles. Key messaging fabric platforms are explained to enable different types of asynchronous communication, along with detailed sample interaction scenarios.

This course was created by Thomas Erl. We are pleased to host this training in our library.

Content Title: Internal Rate of Return for Business Leaders
Content Description: Business leaders need to know the value of investment decisions. Measuring IRR helps leaders make sound business investment decisions and helps them be effective stewards of company finances. In this course, Jason Schenker—an economist, finance expert, futurist, speaker, and author—covers internal rate of return (IRR), net present value (NPV), return on investment (ROI), cash flow, discounted cash flow models (DCF), and the time value of money. Build and deepen your understanding of these topics, and learn how you can apply formulas to specific investment opportunities to make informed, high-value decisions.

Content Title: Interview Mistakes You Can’t Take Back
Content Description: Looking to excel in your next job interview? In this course, Brittany Hayles, an expert career and interview consultant, offers practical strategies to avoid common interview mistakes. Learn how to convey your alignment with company culture, structure your responses to stand out, and tackle personal questions intelligently. After this course, you'll be ready to shine in your next interview, leaving a lasting impression on future employers.

Content Title: Managing Multiple Projects
Content Description:
Multiple projects mean demands and deadlines coming from all angles, increasing the risk of burnout. So how can you effectively juggle all the projects without feeling overwhelmed? In this audio-only course, Elizabeth Harrin shares her five-part model to take the stress out of project management and prevent surprise derailers.

Elizabeth Harrin has trained, mentored, and led project managers for over 20 years. She’s the founder of RebelsGuideToPM.com and the author of Managing Multiple Projects.

Learn how to optimize your workflow by thinking through the 5 Ps: portfolio, plan, people, productivity, and positioning. Discover how to set up time-saving tools and ensure your team follows through. Finally, Elizabeth shares how to flex dynamically using the “iron triangle” of constraints: time, cost, and quality.

This course was created by Pete Mockaitis of How to Be Awesome at Your Job. We are pleased to offer this training in our library.

Content Title: Think Faster, Talk Smarter: Master Impromptu Speaking
Content Description:
Public speaking is a big fear for many people, but off-the-cuff speaking—when you’re put on the spot—can be just as nerve-wracking. Whether you’re asked to introduce yourself or someone else, making small talk, or just asked “What do you think,” giving feedback in the moment can cause even the most confident of us to crumble. In this audiobook summary, Matt Abrahams shares some key points from his book Think Faster, Talk Smarter: How to Speak Successfully When You’re Put on the Spot. Communication is critical to success in our personal and professional lives, yet too often we’re not prepared for the moments when we need to step up and shine. Join Matt in this course to get the guidance—and grit—to be a better-in-the-moment spontaneous communicator.

Note: This audiobook summary was created by Next Big Idea Club. We are pleased to host this content in our library.

Content Title: Consulting Foundations
Content Description: Consulting is a top-paying, high-growth career path that comes with benefits like being able to set your own schedule and define the type of work you do. Whether you want to make the move into the consulting field or become more established and competitive as a consultant, this course can help you both set up and manage a consulting business. Join Mike Figliuolo as he covers the critically important components of consulting—including marketing, selling, contracting, managing engagements, and business administration. Learn how to optimize the time and effort you spend, follow best practices, and avoid common pitfalls. He shares instructions and insights related to expanding client relationships, running engagements, responding to RFPs, protecting intellectual property, getting licensed, and more.

Content Title: How to Generate Marketing Leads with AI
Content Description:
As the use of generative AI becomes more widespread, marketers are benefitting from combining marketing strategies with these tools, leading to innovative techniques for lead generation. In this course, social selling expert and coach Lorenzo Johnson guides you on this transformative journey. Explore AI's role in lead generation, gaining profound insights into essential AI technologies. Navigate the realm of AI-driven customer segmentation, harnessing its power to identify and target specific audiences effectively. Plus, discover how to integrate AI and personalization, enabling precise lead nurturing strategies. After completing this course, you'll have advanced skills to harness AI's potential, revolutionizing your approach to lead generation so you can enhance your marketing abilities.

This course was created by Madecraft. We are pleased to host this training in our library.

This course is part of a Professional Certificate from Microsoft.

Content Title: Essential Skills for Social Media Managers
Content Description: Social media is key to many marketing and publicity endeavors, but what skills do you need to manage your organization’s social media effectively? In this audio-only course, social media and marketing career expert Brian Honigman describes the essential skills for successful social media managers. Brian reviews how to develop a social media strategy, including planning with an editorial calendar and researching your industry. He covers content creation and dives into community management, with topics like responding to customer feedback and providing customer service on social media. Brian explains effective uses for paid social advertising and shows you how to collaborate with partners like internal stakeholders, creators, and other brands. He presents practical tips on analyzing social media goals and metrics, as well as using a mix of measurement tools. Plus, Brian examines how the social media manager's role is likely to develop, so you can stay ahead of the curve.

Content Title: Build with AI: Creating AI Agents with GPT‑5
Content Description: Learn how to build intelligent AI agents using GPT‑5. In this hands-on course, you’ll explore GPT‑5’s advanced capabilities, reasoning, tool calling, and steerability, to create agents that can take action, follow multi-step workflows, and complete real-world tasks. You’ll also learn how to tune behavior with verbosity and reasoning parameters, integrate custom tools, and deploy agents that go beyond simple chat.

Content Title: Social Media Marketing Tips
Content Description: In the modern business landscape, a healthy social media presence is a must for companies large and small, and social media marketing is a must for a healthy professional social media presence. In this course, instructor Sam Dey shares easy-to-use tips for marketing your business on social media. Sam shows you how to research the market and the different types of social media, then goes into how to manage a posting schedule. He discusses how to decide what type of content you should post and where to post it for the most effective impact. Sam explains how to engage influencers and brand advocates, use Google Analytics effectively, boost the reach of your social media campaigns, keep your followers engaged in your content, and more.

Content Title: Pitching Yourself for Opportunity
Content Description: Every conversation presents an opportunity to make a great impression. In this course, Jodi Glickman, CEO and Founder of GreatOnTheJob.com, guides you through how to craft a compelling pitch with thought and intention so you can be persuasive, memorable, and able to reach your goals. Jodi shares the fundamental framework of leading with your destination, crafting your backstory, and then connecting the dots. She covers pitch basics (it’s a dialogue, not a monologue!), cautions against mistakes to avoid, and shares why no two pitches are ever the same. Plus, Jodi offers behind-the-scenes coaching on real-life examples of how to try out, practice, and improve your pitch.

Content Title: Develop Your Marketing Skills
Content Description: Learn how to use effective content and digital marketing techniques to support your objectives and maximize the return on your marketing investments. Learn about principles and methods for showing, promoting, and selling products or services, including marketing strategies and tactics.

Content Title: Develop Critical Thinking, Decision-Making, and Problem-Solving Skills
Content Description: Improve your logic, sharpen your judgment, and make better decisions through critical thinking by exploring alternative solutions to problems. Discover how to question assumptions, apply sound reasoning, break down complex issues into manageable pieces, and grasp the implications of information.

Content Title: Improve Your Time Management Skills
Content Description: Transform your workday and your career by unlocking the secrets of time management. Learn foundational skills that will help you prioritize, schedule, and delegate effectively, all while nurturing your long-term well-being.

Content Title: Essential Business Communication Skills Professional Certificate by LinkedIn Learning
Content Description: Regardless of your role or industry, strong communication skills are essential to advance your career and work more effectively. This learning path will help you to develop your communication skills to build trusting relationships, resolve conflicts, and share your ideas with clarity and confidence. Tune in, pass the final exam, and earn your certificate.

Content Title: Create and Deliver Engaging Presentations
Content Description: You’ve landed a meeting with a dream client, investor, or partner. Next, wow them with your presentation. Presenting your ideas in a clear and visually engaging way is a critical step toward the outcome you want. This learning path can help you create and deliver a compelling presentation.

Content Title: Professional Soft Skills Learning Pathway
Content Description:
Learn how to excel in any job by mastering essential professional soft skills. Develop the skills that hiring managers value most, from emotional intelligence and critical thinking to teamwork and addressing unconscious bias.

Note: To view a version of this learning path with audio descriptions, see Professional Soft Skills Learning Pathway (with Audio Descriptions).

Content Title: Essential Skills in Adobe Illustrator 2025 Professional Certificate
Content Description: Adobe Illustrator is the industry standard for vector graphics and digital illustration. Whether you're creating icons and logos or complex artwork, mastering Illustrator is essential for design professionals. This course covers fundamental tools, techniques, and best practices to help you create professional-quality vector graphics. Complete the course, pass the final exam, and earn your certificate.

Content Title: Keys to Success in Personal Finance
Content Description: Get ahead and take control of your finances with this learning path, which teaches you how to manage and find balance in your personal finances, as well as how to invest when you're ready.

Content Title: Public Speaking Skills Professional Certificate by Toastmasters International
Content Description:
Public speaking is a crucial skill for professional success. With these courses, you'll learn essential techniques for confident and effective communication. This certificate will equip you with the tools to speak confidently, craft and deliver impactful presentations, and develop the non-verbal communication skills that enhance your message. Tune in, pass the final exam, and earn your certificate.

This certificate is endorsed by Toastmasters International, the organization that has empowered more than eight million people to transform their speaking and communication skills since 1924. Find a Toastmasters club local to you (or online) to practice the skills you learn in this path.

Content Title: Develop Your Social Media Marketing Skills
Content Description: Social media marketers are an organization's direct connection to a consumer. Social media has dramatically altered marketing by allowing businesses to authentically engage with their customers. In this learning path, discover how to leverage social media in your overall marketing strategy, and learn best practices for helping you successfully connect with consumers.

Content Title: Develop Your Skills as a Healthcare Project Manager
Content Description: Privacy concerns and regulatory constraints are common roadblocks for healthcare project managers. This learning path will prepare you to meet those challenges, as well as provide you with a foundational knowledge to be an exceptional project manager.

Content Title: How to Find the Work You Love
Content Description: Do you know what your career goals are or you’re on the right track to get there? This course will help you figure out your career goals and find the work you really love. Your instructor Chris Guillebeau guides you through discovering what's most important to you in a future career. Whether uncertain about your direction or seeking to enhance career security, this course helps you discover actionable tools and entrepreneurial thinking to pursue work you love.

Content Title: The Good Life: Lessons from the Longest Study on Happiness (Book Bite)
Content Description:
What makes for a good life? There are countless answers to this question from philosophers, religious types, and self-help authors, not to mention the opinions of family, friends, and neighbors. The research conducted over 85 years by the Harvard Study of Adult Development reveals a surprising answer for the source of happiness: other people. Or more precisely, our relationships to other people. The stronger our relationships, the more likely we are to live happy, satisfying, healthier lives. Marc Shulz, professor of psychology and Director of Data Science at Bryn Mawr College, and Robert Waldinger, professor of psychiatry at Harvard Medical School, explored the findings of the Harvard study in their book, The Good Life: Lessons from the Longest Study on Happiness. In this audiobook summary from Next Big Idea Club, Marc shares five key insights from the book that teach you how to cultivate and improve the relationships that can lead to a happier, more fulfilling life.

This audiobook summary was created by Next Big Idea Club. We are pleased to host this content in our library.

Content Title: Garder son esprit critique à l’ère digitale
Content Description: Dans cette formation proposée par Lucie Rondelet, et qui s'adresse à tous les publics et à tous ceux qui cherchent de l'information, vous aborderez le thème de l'esprit critique à l'heure du digital et d'Internet. Après avoir pris connaissance des dangers auxquels vous pouvez être exposé, vous verrez comment vous en protéger et éviter des pièges comme l'enfermement de la subjectivité ou le biais de confirmation. Votre formatrice vous présentera aussi les travaux de Gérald Bronner et vous expliquera comment chercher de l'information fiable et sûre.

Content Title: Persuader et convaincre : 5 erreurs à éviter lors d'une présentation
Content Description:
Les  « tue-la-com' » sont toutes ces petites choses qui, cumulées, abîment vraiment la relation entre votre auditoire et vous quand vous prenez la parole en public. Il y en a de nombreux, mais parmi ceux-ci, cinq sont particulièrement courants et particulièrement embêtants. Ils ne sont pas très compliqués à éviter ou corriger mais il est tout d'abord essentiel d'en prendre conscience. Découvrez les cinq erreurs les plus courantes lors d'une présentation et apprenez comment s'en affranchir.
</br>
Cette formation a été créée par Pascal Haumont, spécialiste en communication. Nous sommes ravis d'héberger ce contenu sur notre plateforme.

Content Title: How to Break Bad Habits (When You Don't Know They're Bad)
Content Description: Breaking bad habits is hard enough—they’re habits for a reason, after all—but breaking bad habits that you don’t even realize are bad can be exponentially harder. There are many instances in our lives where we do things unconsciously, or worse, where we even think we’re being good or polite, that can end up sabotaging our whole lives. In this course, Samantha Bennett teaches you how to first recognize your bad habits—what they are and how they become habits—and then explains how you can analyze both the good and bad habits in your life. Learn about the small, easy steps you can take towards changing your behavior to create a life that you love.

Content Title: Excel: Dashboards for Beginners (2022)
Content Description:
Did you know that you can quickly create a dashboard in Excel even if you’re pressed for time? While many people assume that dashboards are complicated and limited to the most advanced Excel power users, it’s simply not true–all you need is a little practice. In this short course, Excel MVP Jordan Goldmeier demystifies dashboards and shows you how to create your first interactive dashboard in minutes.

Explore the basic components of a dashboard in Excel: tables, PivotTables, PivotCharts, slicers, and timelines. Learn how to plan a dashboard, create a summary table, build a time series chart, and then finalize your dashboard so it's ready to share with stakeholders. Jordan gives you quick, easy-to-use tips and techniques so you can start visualizing your data immediately.

This course is part of a Professional Certificate from CSCMP.

Content Title: Project Management: Solving Common Project Problems
Content Description: When you're balancing the triple constraints of project management (cost/quality/time) and trying to accomplish something new, problems are bound to crop up. In the course, project management trainer Chris Croft shows how to solve the most common problems that arise when working on projects. By breaking these issues into 4 major categories—people problems, quality problems, cost problems, and time problems—he provides helpful advice and techniques for how to handle them.

Content Title: AI-Powered Presentations: Crafting Compelling PowerPoints with ChatGPT and Copilot
Content Description: Discover how to use generative AI tools like ChatGPT and Microsoft Copilot to create high-impact presentations quickly. Presentation designer Camille Holden guides you through everything you need to know, from researching and generating compelling slide content to exporting AI-generated output into PowerPoint and more. Learn how to use generative AI tools to create a solid outline for your presentation. Leverage the power of AI to flesh out the content of your slides—whether you’re writing eye-catching titles and well-crafted copy or sharing interesting anecdotes and statistics. Explore ways you can build and customize ChatGPT agents. Camille shows you how generative AI tools can help develop images that complement your material. By the end of this course, you’ll be prepared to quickly refine and edit your first drafts in PowerPoint to take your presentations to the next level.

Content Title: Mastering Presentations for Non-Native English Speakers
Content Description:
Giving presentations can be challenging and uncomfortable—even more so when they are not in your native language. In this course, Liesje Sandler, an English coach at Speexx, teaches how to give a successful presentation that makes you feel confident and comfortable. Learn how to prepare a good presentation, master transitions during the presentation, and deal with questions. Plus, get tips and the necessary wording to ensure that the presentation runs smoothly from start to finish.

This course is part of a Business English for Non-Native Speakers series aimed at anyone with a basic knowledge of English who wants to improve their business English skills.

Content Title: Curating Your Instructional Design Portfolio
Content Description:
If you’re an instructional designer, elearning pro, or former teacher transitioning into elearning, having a way to showcase what you've done and can do is essential. Your portfolio showcases your skills, proves your expertise, and highlights your value to potential clients or employers.

In this course, elearning expert David Anderson shows you how to curate and prepare the key elements for a professional portfolio. Find out how to select your best work, organize projects, and present them in a way that reflects your skills and experience. Plus, learn how to craft engaging project descriptions, create impactful thumbnails, and ensure your portfolio remains adaptable as your career evolves.

Content Title: What Is Generative AI?
Content Description:
Whether you work in film, marketing, healthcare, automobile, or real-estate, generative AI is changing the way your job is executed, and those who adapt early will reap its benefits sooner. All professions will be affected by generative AI. Its invention can be compared to the invention of photography, a true creative revolution. If you want to be part of the leaders that are advancing this revolution, this course can get you started on your learning journey.

In this course, generative AI expert Pinar Seyhan Demirdag covers the basics of generative AI, with topics including what it is, how it works, how to create your own content, different types of models, future predictions, and ethical implications.

This course is part of a Professional Certificate from Microsoft.

Content Title: L'essentiel de Node.js
Content Description: Dans cette formation, qui s’adresse aux développeurs JavaScript de niveau débutant, vous allez découvrir Node.js, un environnement d’exécution JavaScript multiplateforme et open source. Nina Kapinga, développeuse full-stack et formatrice en programmation, vous présentera tout d’abord les bases de Nodes.js puis vous accompagnera pas à pas dans son installation. Vous découvrirez ensuite comment l’utiliser. À l’issue de ce cours, vous disposerez des connaissances pour créer et exécuter du code en Node.js, comprendre les grandes lignes de l’environnement d’exécution et créer des applications back-end avec Node.js.

Content Title: Excel pour Mac : Préparer des écritures comptables
Content Description: Si vous pratiquez la comptabilité avec le tableur Microsoft Excel pour Mac, découvrez cette formation d'Alexandra Beauchamps sur la préparation des écritures. Grâce à des cas et à des exercices pratiques, et après avoir mis sur pied les bases de votre organisation, notamment vis-à-vis de votre expert-comptable, vous apprendrez à enregistrer les mouvements et à gérer les pièces comptables, et vous verrez comment éviter les erreurs. Puis, vous assurerez le suivi des frais, des stocks, de la trésorerie, avant de finir sur celui des emprunts et des amortissements.

Content Title: Statistics Foundations 1: The Basics
Content Description:
Statistics is not just the realm of data scientists. All types of jobs use statistics. Statistics are important for making decisions, new discoveries, investments, and predictions. Whether the subject is political races, sports rankings, shopping trends, or healthcare advancements, statistics is an instrument for understanding your favorite topic at a deeper level. In this course, Professor Eddie Davila offers beginner-level lessons, so you too can master the terms, formulas, and techniques needed to perform the most common types of statistics.

Eddie covers several examples of data and charts. He explains how to find the middle of your data set, as well as the mean and median. He introduces range, then goes into standard deviation and what to do with outliers. These techniques help you understand your data, prove theories, and save time, money, and other valuable resources—all by understanding the numbers.

This course is part of a Professional Certificate from Anaconda.

This course is part of a Professional Certificate from Wolfram Research.

Content Title: Enhancing Power BI with Visio Visuals
Content Description: In this course, Scott Helmers—a partner with the Harvard Computing Group (HCG)—shows you how to enhance your data visualizations by integrating Microsoft Visio with Power BI. Explore ways to combine Visio's detailed diagrams with Power BI's dynamic data visualization capabilities to create comprehensive, interactive reports. Practice embedding Visio diagrams in Power BI reports. Discover techniques for adding and configuring Visio visuals within Power BI, learn to leverage Visio's shape data for enhanced interactivity, and find out how color-coding and text annotations can visualize data dimensions directly within your diagrams. This course is designed for data professionals, analysts, and anyone interested in elevating their data presentation skills. By the end of this course, you'll be equipped to create visually rich, interactive reports that provide deeper insights into your data, helping stakeholders understand complex information at a glance.

Content Title: 10 minutes, un livre : Intelligence Artificielle, quel futur pour les humains ?
Content Description: Dans cette formation, vous découvrirez « La vie 3.0 : Être humain à l'ère de l’IA », le livre du physicien et écrivain Max Tegmark. Vous comprendrez comment l'évolution de l'Intelligence Artificielle (IA) a impacté la vie des humains ces dernières années. Vous verrez également comment certains scientifiques envisagent le futur pour la cohabitation entre l'Intelligence Artificielle et l'humanité.</br></br> Cette formation a été créée par Mind Parachutes. Nous sommes ravis d'héberger ce contenu sur notre plateforme.

Content Title: Learning Go (2021)
Content Description:
What is Go? Go is a next-generation, open-source programming language created by Google for building systems, web, and other applications. This course is designed to help developers get started with Go, covering its core language elements and syntax. David Gassner introduces tools and skills used in a Go workflow—including Go Playground, an online tool that takes Go development off the desktop. He also covers basic programming tasks: managing values, using math operators, storing values as complex types, and managing program flow. Plus, learn how to create reusable Go code, read and write files, and make simple web requests.

This course includes Code Challenges powered by CoderPad. Code Challenges are interactive coding exercises with real-time feedback, so you can get hands-on coding practice alongside the course content to advance your programming skills.

Content Title: Communicate to Influence (Blinkist Summary)
Content Description:
Effective communicators do more than just share facts and charts—they inspire. In this audiobook summary, get techniques for engaging audiences large and small, and discover how to avoid common mistakes that can take even great messages off track. Learn about common strains on communication, how to engage your audience with stories and humor, how to identify what your audience cares about, and more. Each lesson is drawn from Communicate to Influence, Ben and Kelly Decker's 2015 guide to enhancing business communication.

Note: This audiobook summary was produced by Blinkist. We are pleased to host this content in our library.

Content Title: Nano Tips for Peak Performance with Shadé Zahrai
Content Description:
Welcome to our Nano Tips series, where LinkedIn Learning creators deliver impactful lessons in literally seconds. In this installment, find out how to supercharge your performance, exploring key insights and techniques from peak performance researcher and behavioral strategist to Fortune 500 companies, Shadé Zahrai.

Learn how to optimize your brain power, habits you can establish for success, and how you can set up a commitment to excellence to level up your career and performance for the long term.

Content Title: Excel pour Mac : Astuces et techniques
Content Description: Si vous êtes utilisateur du tableur Microsoft Excel pour Mac et que vous souhaitez aller plus loin dans sa maîtrise, alors suivez cette formation de Nicolas Levé. Vous verrez comment simplifier la saisie des données dans vos feuilles de calcul et vous apprendrez à tirer parti des formules pour effectuer vos calculs. Vous gagnerez en productivité en apprenant également à mieux gérer vos données, à travailler avec un volume conséquent de données et à personnaliser votre programme et son interface.

Content Title: Accompagner la montée en compétences de votre organisation
Content Description: La montée en compétences est un enjeu majeur pour les organisations, dans un contexte de transformation digitale et de changements rapides. Elle permet aux collaborateurs de développer les compétences nécessaires pour répondre aux besoins de l'entreprise et aux évolutions du marché. Cette formation d'Adilson Borges vise à éveiller les managers à la mise en place d'un dispositif d'accompagnement de la montée en compétences, un processus continu qui nécessite un engagement de la part de l'entreprise comme des collaborateurs. Vous y aborderez également les concepts de upskilling et reskilling, et vous apprendrez à en mesurer l'impact.

Content Title: Créer des images avec l'IA Midjourney
Content Description: Découvrez Midjourney pour réaliser des images de qualité exceptionnelle. Dans cette formation, Martin Lisen, artiste et créateur de contenu 3D, vous explique comment utiliser lintelligence artificielle (IA) pour créer des images incroyables tout en respectant les droits de propriété et une éthique artistique. Vous allez définir le concept dintelligence artificielle, ainsi que les avantages et les risques de lIA. Vous allez également comprendre limportance de prendre en compte ces aspects tout au long du processus de création.

Content Title: Communicating with Emotional Intelligence
Content Description:
Developing your emotional intelligence can help you succeed at any stage of your life or career. It can also help you become a better leader, mentor, and coach. In this course, Brenda Bailey-Hughes defines exactly what emotional intelligence is and how it can help you manage your emotions and build stronger relationships. Learn how to understand others’ perspectives, balance empathy and accountability, demonstrate listening, and respond appropriately to a variety of verbal and nonverbal cues. Using these simple techniques, you can quickly improve your communication and make conversations at work and home more productive and satisfying.

This course is part of a Professional Certificate from LinkedIn Learning.

Content Title: How to Get (and Stay) On Top of Your Inbox
Content Description:
When it comes to your inbox, it's easy to start the day feeling overwhelmed. So many emails, so many contacts—you never know which to focus on first. Not to mention, it makes you feel stressed, confused, and out of control. In this interview-style course, productivity strategist and time management expert Mike Vardy shows you how to respond to emails proactively instead of reactively with too much haste. Learn how to implement a system for managing your inbox, with tips to keep bad habits out of your workflow. Mike provides three simple approaches for how to prioritize and respond to emails, as well as timing strategies to optimize your output and automate certain responses. Upon completion of this course, you'll be equipped with the resources you need to stay on top of your inbox, for once and for all.

This course was created by Madecraft. We are pleased to host this training in our library.

Content Title: Découvrir Power BI
Content Description: Dans cette formation qui s'adresse aux débutants, Benjamin Ejzenberg vous présente Power BI, l'application et le service de visualisation, d'analyse de données et de Business Intelligence (BI) de Microsoft. Après avoir abordé son rôle, les différences avec Excel et ses composants clés, vous procèderez à l'importation des données en respectant quatre règles d'or présentées ici. Vous découvrirez l'interface ainsi que les outils de visualisation des données, avec la mise en forme de votre rapport, puis vous verrez comment analyser les données, publier et partager les rapports.

Content Title: Persuader et convaincre : 5 astuces pour réussir sa présentation avec PowerPoint
Content Description:
PowerPoint est un sujet qui agace tout le monde mais dont peu se sont vraiment emparé, parce qu'on se contente souvent de ce qu'on pense être des évidences. Jetez un œil sur votre dernier PowerPoint. Regardez chaque diapo et demandez-vous honnêtement : est-ce que vous l'avez faite en pensant au bénéfice que l'auditoire peut en tirer ? Découvrez les cinq astuces de Pascal Haumont pour utiliser PowerPoint à bon escient.
</br>
Cette formation a été créée par Pascal Haumont, spécialiste en communication. Nous sommes ravis d'héberger ce contenu sur notre plateforme.

Content Title: Réussir sa start-up
Content Description: Dans cette formation exhaustive de Frédéric Bascuñana, vous découvrirez tout ce qu'il faut savoir pour réussir le parcours de votre start-up, de sa création à son fonctionnement, ainsi que sa place sur le marché, tout en évitant les poncifs et les pièges de ce domaine. Tout d'abord, vous devrez avoir une idée de départ et assurer son éclosion. Vous devrez maîtriser la stratégie et vous entourer d'une équipe pertinente et efficace, puis vous verrez comment créer l'offre et réussir son amorce, comment vendre et fidéliser vos prospects et, bien entendu, produire et délivrer. Vous verrez également comment perfectionner votre leadership et vous assurer l'engagement de vos collaborateurs.

Content Title: Nano Tips for Making Learning a Practice with Dr. Jazz
Content Description: Welcome to our Nano Tips series, where LinkedIn Learning creators deliver impactful lessons in literally seconds. In these videos, Dr. Jazz guides you through cultivating a proactive learning mindset that can help you adapt to change, embrace new challenges, and achieve greater fulfillment in your personal and professional life. Find out why on-the-job learning is so important and how you can leverage skills gap analysis to unlock your potential. Learn how to track your progress, plus how to use mentorship and shadowing to achieve your learning goals. Explore ways embracing new challenges and sharing your knowledge can enhance your growth. Identify ways to leverage company resources and find practical resources for learning job-specific skills. Plus, dive into ways you can bring outside learning to your job. With these concise videos, you can add learning to even your busiest days!

Content Title: AI Agents Made Simple: Your Zero-to-Hero Guide to Prompting for Work Automation
Content Description: Dive into the world of AI agents and learn how to make them work for you, transforming tedious tasks into automated workflows. In this course, José Latorre—a .NET, Azure Cloud, and UI/UX specialist—shows you techniques for crafting precise prompts that not only enhance productivity but also sharpen decision-making capabilities. Gain skills in guiding AI to think out loud, ensuring transparency and improved response quality. Learn how to split large tasks into smaller, manageable parts and integrate personality in AI interactions to maintain engaging communication. Build your understanding of the tools to automate and optimize your daily operations. Explore real-world applications and examples of effective prompt engineering. Engage with AI agents in a way that makes you an AI-powered hero in your field. This course helps you to equip yourself with cutting-edge skills that can make you a sought-after professional in today's AI-driven world.

Content Title: Leading with Emotional Intelligence
Content Description:
In the modern workplace, emotional intelligence drives successful leadership. In this course, leadership speaker, bestselling author, and executive coach Christopher Connors presents practical, actionable guidance on building self-awareness, and the skills to lead effectively in a workplace that has been transformed. Learn how to apply emotional intelligence in a skills-first organization, blend emotional intelligence with psychological safety, inspire your people, lead change, and more. Plus, go through six scenarios that demonstrate emotional intelligence in action.

This course is part of a Professional Certificate from LinkedIn Learning.

Content Title: Copilot for Project Management: Build an AI-Powered Budget Tracker and Forecaster (No Code Required)
Content Description: Discover how to leverage Microsoft 365 Copilot to build an AI-generated budget tracking and financial forecasting tool for your projects. This course, taught by project management expert, Microsoft MVP, and Microsoft Certified Trainer Heather Severino, guides you through how to build an accurate and reliable budget tracking and forecasting tool, step by step.

Content Title: Italian, Part 2: Possessives, Prepositions, and Pronouns
Content Description:
Explore the beauty and diversity of Italy’s history, culture, and cuisine as you learn how to handle real-life conversations in Italian. This course—the second in a four-part series from The Great Courses—covers how possessive adjectives (“my,” “your,” and “our” in English) and possessive pronouns (“mine,” “yours,” and “ours”) function in Italian. Explore their use in text describing the geography, scenic landscapes and coastline, and traditional houses of the Puglia region, and add important vocabulary about the family. Practice what you’ve learned in discussing Tre Fratelli and Mine Vaganti, two films set in Puglia.

About the instructor

Kristina Olson is an associate professor of Italian and the Italian program coordinator at George Mason University, where she has taught Italian language, literature, and cinema since 2005. She earned her PhD in Italian from Columbia University. Professor Olson is the author of Courtesy Lost: Dante, Boccaccio, and the Literature of History and several articles on Dante, Boccaccio, and Petrarch. She is the coeditor of Open City: Seven Writers in Postwar Rome; Boccaccio 1313–2013; and the second edition of Approaches to Teaching Dante’s Divine Comedy with the Modern Language Association. Professor Olson is the president of the American Boccaccio Association and was the vice president of the Dante Society of America.

Content Title: Azure Data Factory
Content Description:
If you want to grow your skills as a data scientist or enterprise application expert, you need to know how to design and manage an integrated IT strategy. Enter Azure Data Factory, the fully managed, serverless data integration service from Microsoft. In this course, instructor Karsten Ulferts shows you how to use Azure Data Factory (ADF) for pipelining and data transformation.

Explore the basics of successful deployment and the key terms of the ADF object model, ramping up your skill set to assess and analyze data output and data quality. Learn how concrete data integration solutions can be implemented with ADF, using extensions and available improvements to go beyond normal testing operations. Karsten gives you tips along the way on other more advanced object modeling tools, such as triggers, integration runtimes, Power Query, flowlets, quotas, limitations, and more.

Content Title: How to Calm Your Mind: Finding Presence and Productivity (Book Bite)
Content Description:
You can overcome your anxieties, even in challenging situations, but first you need to learn how to calm your mind. In the 2022 book How to Calm Your Mind: Finding Presence and Productivity, productivity expert Chris Bailey explores practical, scientific techniques for reducing stress and enhancing productivity in your daily life. Tune into this audiobook summary from Next Big Idea Club to hear Chris share five key insights from How to Calm Your Mind.
