Learn how to manage the effects and distractions of dopamine, conduct a stimulation fast, replace dopamine-driven activities with well-rounded analog ones, and develop your understanding of the six triggers of burnout. Along the way, find out how to discover greater depths of calm in the analog world and reflect on the parts of your life that you value most.

Note: This audiobook summary was created by Next Big Idea Club. We are pleased to host this content in our library.

Content Title: Navigating Organizational Politics as a Senior Leader
Content Description:
Navigating organizational politics may seem like a distraction from your job, but if you’re in a senior leadership position, politics largely is your job. In this course, organizational politics expert Niven Postma teaches you how to successfully navigate organizational politics at the senior leadership level. You'll learn about the 6Ps of political intelligence, how to make decisions about political trade-offs, deliver performance outcomes to increase your political capital, prioritize and nurture strategic partnership, and boost social influence to get things done. Plus, Niven details the role reputation plays in developing political capital, and explains how you should choose your political battles.

This course is part of a Professional Certificate from LinkedIn Learning.

This course includes AI-powered Role Play. Role Play allows you to practice what you’ve learned in interactive simulations of real-world conversations.

Content Title: Strategic Thinking
Content Description: Strategic thinking is a valuable skill for everyone in an organization, and it becomes more essential as you ascend the ladder. In this practical course, professor and author Dorie Clark guides you through building a habit of thinking strategically. Dorie shows you how to set the stage for strategic thinking by asking yourself the right questions, making time to be strategic, getting strategic about your career, and more. She highlights ways you can develop your strategic thinking, including considering the future, learning from the past, and creating an informed strategy. Dorie explains how to implement strategic thinking with your team and measure your success. Plus, she goes over treating strategic thinking as an ongoing process and handling problems when they occur. Learn how to make strategic thinking a habit that works for you!

Content Title: Strategic Social Media: Grow Your Business
Content Description:
Social media never really stands still, and neither can your social media strategy. In this course, veteran marketer and Silicon Valley top voice Anke Audenaert demonstrates some of the most up-to-date strategies for using social media to find new customers, scale your business, and build your brand. Learn how to plan a targeted social media campaign, develop an online presence, effectively leverage a variety of social media platforms and channels, and create a robust content marketing plan. Along the way, Anke shows you how to build a following, manage complex customer interactions, and design and implement effective social media ads.

This course was created by Madecraft. We are pleased to host this training in our library.

Content Title: Preparing Your Organization for AI Agents
Content Description: When leaders know how to lead AI-driven change, they can successfully guide their organizations through transitions, foster innovation, and ensure that their teams are prepared for the future. In this course for organizational leaders, Andreas Welsch—an internationally-recognized advisor on scaling AI adoption in organizations—emphasizes the key business functions that will change with AI, as well as how you can navigate those changes and prepare for enterprise-wide adoption of AI agents. When you complete this course, you’ll have a solid understanding of the skills you need to navigate the transition to AI-enhanced workflows smoothly, ensuring that your organization remains competitive and technologically advanced.

Content Title: Mastering Communications as a Leader
Content Description:
Leaders aren’t born, they’re trained. Leaders develop their abilities to motivate and inspire others to positive action. Regardless of where you are in your career, boosting your communications skills will take you where you want to go, faster. In this course, Emmy-winning former CNN correspondent Gina London explains the power of communicating with purpose and impact. She illustrates that communication is not a soft skill—it’s a critical skill and one you need as a leader. Join Gina to learn how to: embrace the possibility of change to excel; develop executive presence; structure your communications for impact; use body language; play your voice like an instrument; and more.

Note: This course was created by genConnectU. We are pleased to host this training in our library.

Content Title: Three Steps to Mental Well Being at Work
Content Description:
As people transition back into the world and the workforce following the isolation of the COVID-19 pandemic, there’s much uncertainty on the best ways to go about this. In this course, Dr. Jay Kumar, author of The Science of a Happy Brain, outlines three powerful steps that can guide you and your company to peace of mind and well-being, post-pandemic. Dr. Kumar uses the values of being ready, resilient, and reflective to deliver strategies that can help restore and rehumanize your own work life and your company’s workforce. He explains the ways that your brain sabotages your mental health and well-being and offers strategies to nurture and retrain the brain to resilience. Dr. Kumar shares accessible ways to cope with stress and the daily pressures related to working virtually, and provides practices to maintain a sense of interdependence in the midst of our recent independent—and in some cases, isolated—lives.

Note: This course was created by genConnectU. We are pleased to host this training in our library.

Content Title: Artificial Intelligence Foundations: Neural Networks
Content Description:
An artificial neural network uses the human brain as inspiration for creating a complex machine learning system. They can classify millions of sounds, videos, and images, answer our questions, understand our behaviors, and even drive our cars. Neural networks are also the foundation of generative AI.

This course introduces the fundamental techniques and principles of neural networks, common models, and their applications. Instructor Gwendolyn Stripling takes you through the different neural network architectures, their components, appropriate use cases, and best practices for improving neural network model performance. Plus, gain hands-on experience building and training a neural network using the Keras Sequential API, an open-source library that demystifies the design and training of neural networks. If you’re looking to achieve a solid understanding of how to build, train, improve and use neural networks, join Gwendolyn in this course.

Content Title: How to Network Like a Leader
Content Description: Networking is not just about collecting contacts; it's about building meaningful relationships. In this course, executive coach, speaker, and psychologist Dr. Alessandra Wall discusses the psychology behind networking. She also shares strategies to help you network in an innovative way that boosts your leadership brand, skills, and opportunities. After completing this course, you'll be able to build authentic connections and leverage your network to grow as a leader.

Content Title: Décuplez vos capacités créatives
Content Description: Décuplez vos capacités créatives avec Lionel Pigaglio, illustrateur et enseignant en dessin et peinture numérique.  Plongez dans des étapes, suivez un cheminement de pensées et de défis pratiques pour préciser, affiner et, enfin, proposer vos idées. Atteignez votre plein potentiel artistique par une idéation maîtrisée et apaisée. Cette formation vous donnera toutes les clés pour comprendre, oser, évaluer rapidement et proposer, avec enthousiasme, des idées créatives intéressantes et convaincantes !

Content Title: Copilot in Teams: AI-Powered Collaboration
Content Description:
The Copilot add-on in Teams lets you use several Artificial Intelligence features to level up your productivity. Join instructor Nick Brazzi as he shows how to get summaries or answers about chat conversations. Copilot can also help you find information about meetings. So, if you’re late to a meeting, Copilot can get you caught up. This course will also show how to use the Microsoft 365 chat assistant to get answers about your schedule, your documents, and other information from your organization.

This course is part of a Professional Certificate from Microsoft.

Content Title: Canva for Web and Digital Design Projects
Content Description: In this course, globally recognized trainer Heather Severino shows you how to use Canva for projects like blog and website design, YouTube channel design, social media graphics, online business and marketing projects, and more. After a solid introduction to Canva and its workspaces, dive into creating and publishing social media content and marketing content. Plus, explore ways you can use Magic Studio, an AI-powered design toolset, to streamline and expand what you can do.

Content Title: Six Sigma: Black Belt
Content Description:
Demonstrate your mastery of Six Sigma principles, philosophies, and related tools by becoming a Certified Six Sigma Black Belt. Black Belts operate under Master Black Belts to apply Six Sigma methodology to specific projects. They devote all of their valued time to Six Sigma. In this course, operational excellence expert, master Black Belt trainer, and professor Dr. Richard Chua explains how to use Six Sigma and its quality and statistical tools as he prepares you to become a Black Belt.

Dr. Richard Chua builds upon his Six Sigma: Green Belt, Six Sigma Foundations, and Learning Minitab courses—which are prerequisites to this course—and covers an array of topics, including measurement system analysis, hypothesis testing, response surface methods, displaying improved process capabilities, and more.

Content Title: Social Media Marketing Foundations
Content Description:
Social media marketing is a worthwhile investment and a useful business tool, but how can you make it work for you? In this course, marketing consultant Brian Honigman guides you through what you need to know. Learn how to develop a plan to guide your social media activities. Find out how to use reporting to better direct future social media activities and demonstrate your results to stakeholders. Explore the value of crafting personas, choosing the right social networks, and publishing engaging social content. Discover ways social media can help you interact with customers. Go over how to foster social media partnerships and set up successful creator campaigns. Plus, learn how to experiment with social media to stand out consistently.

This course is part of a Professional Certificate from Hootsuite.

Content Title: Se faire respecter
Content Description:
Au quotidien, il est important de respecter les autres personnes et de se faire respecter. Pour cela, vous devez rester intègre en toute situation et savoir faire appliquer vos propres règles dans les différents cadres que vous côtoyez. Dans ce cours, Yann Piette, spécialiste en coaching, vous donne des conseils et des exemples précis en termes de comportements à adopter et de gestion de soi. Vous verrez que dans votre environnement professionnel, votre hiérarchie et vos collègues sauront rester dans le cadre du travail. Vous gagnerez également en respect et en sérénité dans vos relations amicales, familiales et amoureuses.

Cette formation a été créée par Yann Piette. Nous sommes ravis d'héberger ce contenu sur notre plateforme

Content Title: Project Management with Microsoft Copilot
Content Description: Unlock the potential of Microsoft Copilot to streamline your project management tasks and boost efficiency. Taught by certified Project Management Professional and Microsoft MVP Cindy M. Lewis, this course is designed to equip project managers with skills to leverage Copilot seamlessly in daily workflows. Cindy provides practical, actionable tips for everything from generating clear project scope documents and effective communication plans to streamlining stakeholder reporting. Learn how to develop detailed project timelines, manage risks, and create compelling status reports. Harness the power of Copilot to stay on top of project discussions, identify data trends, and even get ideas to keep your team motivated and engaged.

Content Title: Build with AI: Developing a Code Review Assistant
Content Description:
Explore the intricacies of Python programming with an emphasis on mastering data structures and gain a competitive edge by learning to write cleaner, more efficient, and highly organized code. This course helps you analyze and manipulate data effectively using Python’s powerful features, and is ideal for software developers, data scientists, and tech enthusiasts eager to refine their coding skills and elevate their programming knowledge.

Learn about key concepts such as lists, dictionaries, and sets, while understanding how they can enhance your code efficiency. Delve into the optimization of algorithms to improve your problem-solving capabilities. Uncover best practices for organizing and managing data in complex systems. Check out this course to learn how to confidently tackle coding challenges with improved speed and precision, making you a valuable asset in any development team.

Content Title: Data Visualization: A Lesson and Listen Series
Content Description:
Follow along with expert Bill Shander in this series exploring key themes in data visualization, data storytelling, and information design. Each episode is broken into two segments: a short lesson and a listening session where Bill interviews data storytelling and visualization experts about the episode theme. These conversations reveal the creative process, explore techniques and technologies used by working professionals, and illuminate some of the common challenges they face. This series is perfect for anyone interested in how information is presented to the mass market, including professionals in all levels of analytics, data science, and communications.

Note: Because this is an ongoing series, viewers will not receive a certificate of completion.

Content Title: AI-Driven Project Management: Techniques and Insights with Ricardo Vargas
Content Description: In this conversation-based course, project management leader Ricardo Vargas demonstrates next-level techniques for incorporating AI into project management workflows. Incorporating real-life examples throughout the discussion, we explore how project managers can use generative AI to create effective team collaboration strategies. We look at how AI can assist in resource management, change management, crisis management, and more—all while enhancing and even challenging a project manager's intuition in making critical decisions. We also explore various ways AI tools can be used to boost creativity and innovation within project teams. After watching this course, project managers should feel empowered to incorporate AI tools in their own workflows.

Content Title: Rock Your LinkedIn Profile (2019)
Content Description: Explore how to create a LinkedIn profile that brings your personal career story to life, whether you’re just starting out, seeking to advance, or making a career change. Instructor Lauren Jolda—head of the "Rock Your Profile" team at LinkedIn—offers tips on tailoring each section, starting with the key insight that a LinkedIn profile is unique and shouldn’t be approached exactly like a resume. Lauren covers ways to add media to a profile, methods for showcasing your career accomplishments and aspirations, and specific examples of profile phrases and language that can help inspire your personal story.

Content Title: Excel: Data Storytelling for Beginners
Content Description: What’s the difference between a confusing, information-packed spreadsheet and one that clearly communicates key data points? Storytelling. You may not think of Excel as the right place for business storytelling, but it’s actually the perfect place. Combining Excel's data visualization features with a few basic storytelling techniques can ensure you communicate your data in a simple and concise way for your audience. In this course, Microsoft Excel MVP Jordan Goldmeier begins by outlining the basics of data storytelling, including the key components of a good data story. Then he shows how to use Excel to tell your data story, covering how to create your data set, choose the right chart types, and enhance your story with labels, titles, and other elements. Plus, Jordan highlights how to enhance your story with data visualization features from Excel add-ins.

Content Title: Managing Your Anxiety While Presenting
Content Description: Whether presenting, pitching, delivering a toast, or contributing in a meeting, most people experience some degree of anxiety about speaking in public. In this course, author Matt Abrahams explores what causes people to feel nervous and shares some common anxiety management pitfalls. He then offers anxiety management techniques to help you become more comfortable and confident when speaking in front of others. Matt also discusses specific things you can do to manage sources and symptoms of anxiety which can enable you to feel and appear more confident for any audience.

Content Title: Nano Tips to Speak Up in Meetings with Shadé Zahrai
Content Description: Welcome to our Nano Tips series, where LinkedIn Learning creators deliver impactful lessons in literally seconds. In this course, behavioral strategist and peak performance educator for Fortune 500s Shadé Zahrai teaches you quick tips for speaking up in meetings and making your voice heard. Learn how to avoid mistakes that harm your credibility and influence, speak up when you can’t find your turn, contribute value with strategic questions, claim back credit for overlooked suggestions, and more.

Content Title: Excel 2016 : Les formules et les fonctions avancées
Content Description: Partez à la découverte des fonctions et des formules d'Excel 2016. Dans cette formation qui s'adresse aux utilisateurs maîtrisant déjà Excel, Martial Auroy vous dévoile des fonctions de calcul reposant sur des critères et des conditions. Aussi, tirez parti des nombres, des textes et des dates, puis initiez-vous aux matrices et aux techniques de recherche. À la fin de cette formation, vous maîtriserez l'analyse et la manipulation de données sous conditions dans Excel 2016.

Content Title: Model Context Protocol (MCP) for Beginners by Microsoft
Content Description:
Are you just getting started with AI agents and looking to take your skills to the next level? In this course, designed uniquely for beginners, learn how to build AI agents with the Model Context Protocol (MCP)—a powerful framework for building secure, scalable, and real-world AI applications. Find out how to design and deploy AI agents with MCP in Visual Studio Code, contribute to the developer community, and apply best practices from early adopters across a variety of industries. Whether you’re a budding developer or an enthusiast interested in learning more about AI technology, this course outlines in-demand skills and valuable insights that you can apply in practice to create advanced AI applications.

This course was created by Microsoft Developer. We are pleased to host this training in our library.

Content Title: Faire une bonne première impression
Content Description: La première impression est marquante. Que ce soit dans le cadre d'une réunion, d'un entretien ou d'une négociation, vous devez savoir établir une relation instantanément. Heureusement, la capacité à faire une bonne première impression n'est pas innée : c'est une science qui s'acquiert. Vanessa Van Edwards est enquêtrice principale chez Science of People, laboratoire de recherche spécialisé dans les comportements humains. Dans cette formation, elle vous enseigne des stratégies étayées par la recherche qui peuvent vous aider à réussir les premières secondes de toutes vos interactions. Elle décrit également le langage corporel essentiel pour faire une première impression intéressante, les indices vocaux qui dénotent de l'assurance, en personne ou au téléphone, ainsi que les meilleures phrases d'accroche pour engager une conversation satisfaisante. Elle vous donne aussi des conseils pour transformer les échanges de banalités ternes en discussions animées et mémorables.

Content Title: Nano Tips for Working with Recruiters with Sho Dewan
Content Description: Welcome to our Nano Tips series, where LinkedIn Learning creators deliver impactful lessons in literally seconds. In this course, career coach and CEO of Workhap Sho Dewan highlights what you need to know in order to get what you need from interactions with recruiters. Learn about different types of recruiters, a recruiter’s role, and how recruiters can find you on LinkedIn. Find out how to write a resume that will impress a recruiter, and go over what recruiters really care about. Make sure you know how to answer three common questions, contact recruiters, and negotiate salaries with them. Plus, dive into ways you can follow up after an interview and three helpful things you can do if you get ghosted.

Content Title: A Modern Guide to Strategy Implementation
Content Description:
Successful leaders need to know how to define and choose the right strategies for their organizations. But they also need to be able to implement them successfully, which is where the Strategy Implementation Roadmap can be a huge help. In this course, instructor Antonio Nieto-Rodriguez walks you through the basics of strategy implementation so you can develop the highly demanded skills and tools you need to become an effective implementation specialist.

Explore ways to enhance your leadership abilities in an increasingly complex business world. Get an introduction to strategy implementation fundamentals, as developed by world experts from the Strategy Implementation Institute. Learn to avoid common pitfalls and adopt a proven and simple to use roadmap to guide your organization through its strategy implementation journey, including leadership execution, value creation, stakeholder management, business culture, employee engagement, performance tracking, and more.

Content Title: Amplifying Your Message Through Powerful Framing and Storytelling
Content Description:
In this audio-only course, Rene Rodriguez, author of Amplify Your Influence: Transform How You Communicate and Lead, reveals a powerful three-step formula for amplifying your influence and getting your message heard. In his talk with Pete Mockaitis, Rene reveals: the surprising reason why your audience isn’t listening; the most powerful communication skill in your arsenal; how to craft a narrative and message that sticks. Rene talks about how helping people save face—crafting your message in a way where someone doesn’t have to admit that they’re wrong—drastically increases the chance of getting them to change. He also covers the importance of framing, and how preparing your audience to listen by providing context through a story can change what others perceive and influence them to follow you. Learn these lessons and more in this course to start creating your own impactful messages.

This course was created by Pete Mockaitis of How to Be Awesome at Your Job. We are pleased to offer this training in our library.

Content Title: Adopter la posture d'un manager coach
Content Description: Si vous souhaitez devenir un bon manager coach et contribuer à la progression durable de votre équipe, alors suivez cette formation de Ludovic Girodon. Tout d'abord, vous aborderez le bon état d'esprit à adopter, vous vous pencherez sur les notions de posture haute et de posture basse puis vous les mettrez en pratique. Vous apprendrez les piliers de l'écoute active, les familles de questions et celles à éviter, et les bonnes pratiques pour le feedback. Enfin, vous verrez en quoi consistent les 5 piliers DREAM ainsi que la technique de résonance.

Content Title: Consulting Foundations: Client Management and Relationships
Content Description: Client relationships are the foundation of your consulting business. Whether you work for a big firm or are going solo as an independent consultant, the principles of client management are the same. It's all about building rapport, communicating effectively, and establishing trust. In this course, Lisa Earle McLeod and Elizabeth McLeod teach you how to position yourself for success, keep communication lines open during implementation of your project, and create connections that are the foundation for lasting relationships that lead to repeat business. Plus, get tips for leveraging client relationships to sell to the entire organization.

Content Title: Oser le courage managérial
Content Description: Découvrez comment renforcer votre leadership et votre capacité à agir avec audace et détermination. Abordez notamment la définition et les enjeux du courage, qui est une compétence indispensable pour les managers d'aujourd'hui. Apprenez aussi à renforcer la confiance en vous et en votre équipe, ainsi que l'importance de la congruence du leader, la gestion des risques, la prise de décisions puissantes, la gestion des conflits et l'assertivité afin d'inspirer par l'exemple. </br></br> Cette formation a été créée par Nolwenn Bernache-Assolant, coach en leadership et management des entreprises. Nous sommes ravis d'héberger ce contenu sur notre plateforme.

Content Title: Optimizing Your LinkedIn Profile Nano Tips with Kim Kaupe
Content Description: Welcome to our Nano Tips series, where LinkedIn Learning creators deliver impactful lessons in literally seconds. In this installment, Kim Kaupe shows you how to optimize your LinkedIn profile allowing you to get noticed faster and stand out from others in your field. Kim shows you how to use creator mode to boost your search results, add a cover story to your profile, customize your LinkedIn URL, and more. Plus, get tips for how to create a dynamic profile picture and video profile.

Content Title: Developing Your Professional Image in a New Job
Content Description: For new graduates transitioning from school to the world of work, creating a professional image isn't always intuitive. In this course, executive coach and organizational psychologist Gemma Leigh Roberts provides tips and guidance that can help you successfully navigate the start of your professional career. Gemma highlights the main differences between campus life and being part of the workforce, and explains how to develop the right mindset for dealing with workplace challenges and getting ahead in your career. Plus, she shares tips for acclimating to a new workplace, and discusses how to create a career strategy that sets you up for success, focusing on your vision, mission, goals, and targets.

Content Title: Mastering Model Context Protocol (MCP)
Content Description: Model Context Protocol (MCP) is trending as a must-know protocol for working with LLMs and tools. MCP was introduced in November 2024, and since then, it’s become the standard of most large LLM players, including OpenAI and Google, as well as many other enterprises. An ideal fit for data scientists, AI engineers, and ML engineers, this course covers the essential challenges of tool integration with LLMs, customizing settings, verifying server operation, and implementing security best practices. Along the way, instructor Jonathan Fernandes outlines key considerations such as resource registration, server configuration, debugging interactions, and using Docker for containerization.

Content Title: Impress Interviewers with These Five Questions
Content Description:
Interviews are used to see if you would be a good fit for a specific role. They are also used to determine if an organization would be a good fit for you. Asking insightful questions during your interview can help you stand out from the rest of the candidates for the role. In this course, Nneka Craigwell, a certified HR professional, shares five insightful questions that you can bring to your next interview to impress the organization of your dreams. Explore the impact of the role you are interviewing for and the ways you’ll be able to collaborate with other members of the team. Nneka offers strategies to ask about the organization’s culture and goals as well as how it defines and measures success. Upon completing this course, you’ll be prepared to walk into your next interview equipped with greater confidence, clarity, and poise.

This course was created by Madecraft. We are pleased to host this training in our library.

Content Title: Telling Stories That Stick
Content Description: What makes a good story? Why do some stories stick with us while others are forgotten as soon as we hear them? In this course, award-winning entrepreneur, author, and activist Elisa Camahort Page teaches you the secrets to telling a story that sticks. Whether you’re trying to close a sale, presenting at a conference, or speaking to media outlets, the principles Elisa outlines can help you successfully accomplish your objectives. She covers the importance of tailoring your story to your specific audience, how to craft talking points that support the story you want to tell, how to master interviews so your messages come through, and more. Elisa also covers tactical aspects of presenting, from how to dress to what to do with your hands to managing verbal ticks or crutch words. Finally, she shows you how to measure the success of your messaging and use that to improve your messaging in the future.

Content Title: Excel: Tips and Tricks (2023)
Content Description:
Want to take your Excel game to the next level? In this course, veteran Excel trainer and instructor Dennis Taylor shares powerful tips, tricks, and shortcuts that can help you leverage more of what Excel has to offer. Learn time-saving tricks for creating formulas rapidly, accelerating data entry, and navigating within worksheets efficiently. Plus, discover drag and drop techniques, formatting shortcuts, charting, and much more.

Note: This course was recorded on Excel for Microsoft 365; however, most of the contents will benefit anyone using Office 2019 or 2016.

Content Title: Learning Microsoft 365 Copilot for Work (2024)
Content Description:
Discover how—through Copilot—AI can help you create documents, summarize messages, and analyze data from natural language requests in Word, Excel, Outlook, Teams, and PowerPoint. Staff instructor Nick Brazzi also introduces Microsoft 365 Business Chat, which allows you to ask questions and make requests using secure data from your calendar, messages, and files.

This course is part of these Professional Certificates from Microsoft:

  • Generative AI for Marketing with Microsoft 365 Copilot
  • Generative AI for Sales with Microsoft 365 Copilot
  • Generative AI for Customer Service with Microsoft 365 Copilot
  • Microsoft Copilot for Productivity by Microsoft and LinkedIn
  • Career Essentials in Generative AI by Microsoft and LinkedIn

Content Title: Enhancing Product Development with Custom ChatGPTs
Content Description: Do you want to take your product development to the next level? In this course, Ethan Cole, a technology leader and product expert, shares how to harness the power of AI to enhance your productivity and innovation. Learn to generate product ideas and implement custom GPTs in product development cycle from conception to execution. After this course, you'll be ready to implement GPTs into your product development workflows and achieve new heights.

Content Title: PowerPoint et Microsoft 365 Copilot : Du prompt à la présentation
Content Description:
Si vous souhaitez être assisté lors de la réalisation de présentations PowerPoint, alors cette formation de Chantal Bossé est pour vous. En effet, vous allez découvrir Copilot, l'assistant IA de la suite bureautique Microsoft 365. Vous commencerez par vous familiariser avec la notion de prompts et d'invites, vous apprendrez à concevoir un plan de présentation, puis vous entrerez dans le vif du sujet, c'est-à-dire la réalisation de présentations grâce à de nombreux exemples concrets. Vous verrez comment créer du contenu à partir de modèles ou pas, comment ajouter des médias et comment modifier, analyser et résumer, notamment si votre présentation se destine à plusieurs audiences différentes.

Ce cours fait partie d’un certificat professionnel de Microsoft.

Content Title: CONTENT METADATA NO LONGER EXISTS - urn:li:lyndaCourse:3940373
Content Description: CONTENT METADATA NO LONGER EXISTS - urn:li:lyndaCourse:3940373

Content Title: Producing Podcasts
Content Description: Want to share your message with the world? Why not start your own podcast? Podcasts are more popular than ever, which makes podcasting a great way to capture an audience of engaged listeners. With today's inexpensive recording equipment and editing software, it's possible to self-produce a podcast from anywhere. This course is designed to take you step by step through the entire process, from planning your format and buying the right equipment to recording your podcast and uploading episodes for distribution. Instructor Danny Ozment has produced over 20 different podcasts, which are downloaded more than 100,000 times a month. Here he provides inside tips on setting up your environment, recording and editing clean audio takes, building an audience, and turning that audience into a community of followers.

Content Title: Publier efficacement sur LinkedIn
Content Description: Quels que soient votre secteur d'activité et votre fonction, publier sur LinkedIn est un excellent moyen de mettre en avant votre expertise et votre entreprise. Avec cette formation de Grégory Mancel, vous découvrirez les nombreux outils à votre disposition, les médias que vous serez en mesure d'utiliser et comment créer des publications impactantes, pertinentes et qui remporteront l'adhésion du public visé. Vous verrez également comment interagir avec vos publications, comment leur donner une seconde vie et comment tirer parti des statistiques et des résultats pour en augmenter la portée.

Content Title: Micro-Presentations: Saying More in Less Time
Content Description:
Brevity is key to effective communication, especially in a world where capturing the attention of an audience has become increasingly challenging. But how do you ensure that your audience gets the information they need when time is limited? In this course, public speaking coach Lisa Braithwaite shares how to condense your content without compromising your material.

Lisa starts by explaining the value of presentations that are under five minutes. She then reviews the elements of a strong presentation and shares the key factors that contribute to a successful micro-presentation. She covers how to structure your content, what to leave in, and more importantly, what to take out. Lisa also goes over concepts to help you practice your presentation, keep your audience engaged, and avoid common mistakes. After this course, you'll be ready to start crafting shorter presentations that pack a punch.

This course was created by Madecraft. We are pleased to host this training in our library.

Content Title: LinkedIn Creator Mode
Content Description: The term “creator economy” describes the work that people and organizations produce—such as videos, photos, or blog posts—to garner a following online. The LinkedIn feed is driven by creators looking for a way to connect with their audience. Are you looking to become a creator, or are you already creating but want to build a larger following? The Creator Profile feature on LinkedIn gives you a set of tools to jumpstart your presence in the creator ecosystem on LinkedIn. Kim Kaupe, a successful LinkedIn creator, introduces you to Creator Mode, how to turn it on and get started using it, and more. Kim explains the “talks about” section and how to add your own hashtags. She covers how to customize your banner, add a short introduction video to your profile, and implement a follower button and a featured section. Plus, Kim goes over how to add the pronunciation feature to your name so other can feel confident when meeting you or introducing you to others.

Content Title: Choosing the Right Project Management Certification for Your Career
Content Description: In this course, discover which project management certification can help you meet your career goals. Follow along with Asya Watkins, founder of Women of Project Management, as she provides a tour of some of the top certifications in the project management field—including the PMP, CAPM, agile PM certifications, and Lean Six Sigma. Asya begins by helping you assess current skills and career aspirations. Next, she takes you through the key considerations for each certification: ideal candidates, exam format, and eligibility. Learn how to match your personal goals with the right certification, and evaluate which certification aligns best with your career objectives.

Content Title: Transformer vos salariés / salariées en ambassadeurs de votre marque
Content Description: La marque employeur est devenue un pilier central de la stratégie globale d'une entreprise. Comprendre et maîtriser les réseaux sociaux, ainsi que les plateformes en ligne, devient essentiel pour construire une image de marque forte et attractive. C'est pourquoi Maud Grenier, Recruteuse, Responsable RH depuis plus de 15 ans et Top Voice sur LinkedIn, vous propose ce cours afin de vous guider et faire de vos salariés votre meilleur atout. Ensemble, vous allez aborder les techniques, les astuces et les conseils essentiels pour attirer les talents. Incitez-les à devenir de véritables ambassadeurs de l'entreprise et dynamisez ainsi la marque employeur !

Content Title: Social Media Marketing for Small Business
Content Description: What does it take to be successful at social media marketing? Find out in this course, as digital marketing expert Martin Waxman helps you to develop and implement a social media marketing strategy tied to your business goals. Martin shares definitions, strategy best practices, and tips for key activities like goal-setting, identifying and training your team, finding your customers online, and writing an action plan. He also outlines what content to publish where, how to publish it, and how to measure your success. Done well, social media marketing can help your small business build better relationships with customers.

Content Title: Landing a MAANG Job: Behavioral Interview Questions
Content Description: Have you dreamed of landing a job at Meta, Amazon, Apple, Netflix, and Google, and other top-tier tech companies? These positions can seem daunting at first to most candidates (even those who ultimately landed offers!), but what most candidates don't know is that there is a highly-structured way to tackle the interview process that will maximize your chances of landing the offers. In this course, Vincent Xu, a former Googler and founder of recruiting powerhouse TalentGeist, demystifies the interview process at top-tier tech companies (MAANG and equivalents like Microsoft and ByteDance), helping you nail kind of interview questions that you'll get regardless of what role you're applying for: behavioral, motivational, resume-based, and company knowledge questions. Get exclusive insights that you can start applying right away to your own interview prep.

Content Title: Communication Foundations
Content Description:
Your communication skills affect your career prospects, the value you bring to your company, and the likelihood of your promotion. This course helps you communicate better in a variety of professional situations, including meetings, digital communications, pitches, and presentations. Instructors Tatiana Kolovou and Brenda Bailey-Hughes introduce the four building blocks of communication—people, message, context, and listening—and show how they apply in different circumstances. Join Tatiana and Brenda as they share their communications tool kits and show you how to build this core competency and communicate in a way that effectively and professionally conveys your message.

This course includes AI-powered Role Play. Role Play allows you to practice what you’ve learned in interactive simulations of real-world conversations.

This course is part of these Professional Certificates:

  • Becoming a Manager Professional Certificate from LinkedIn Learning.
  • Career Essentials in Administrative Assistance Professional Certificate from Microsoft.
  • Professional Soft Skills Learning Pathway from Microsoft.

Content Title: Marketing on Instagram
Content Description: If you're interested in marketing your product or service on Instagram, join Anson Alexander in this course as he acquaints you with key features and digital marketing strategies that can help improve your online presence and boost sales using the popular social platform. Anson demonstrates how to use built-in Instagram tools for businesses, brainstorm content ideas, and develop a posting schedule based on the activity of your target market. He shares tips for creating engaging content with Instagram Stories and Reels. Anson demonstrates how to use Instagram Insights to review statistics and metrics regarding your posts to optimize your marketing strategies. He also shows how to create shopping posts in Instagram Shopping as well as how to use paid ads to reach a wider audience. Plus, Anson provides insider tips and secrets that can help you navigate the Instagram community like a pro.

Content Title: Social Media Marketing: Strategy and Optimization
Content Description:
View Martin's LinkedIn Newsletter

Learn a three-step recipe for optimizing your social media marketing mix. Get a fresh perspective on your content, your choice of platform, and your strategy. Join digital communication strategist Martin Waxman for this illuminating short course that will get even the most experienced marketers out of a social media rut. Learn how to analyze what's working—and what's not—with SWOT analysis, and adapt your plan to capitalize on your strengths. Then Martin takes you through the types of social media content you can create on the various platforms and how they can help you achieve your brand's goals. Plus, learn how to turn strategy into action and create paid and organic posts and stories that engage your customers.

This course is part of a Professional Certificate from Hootsuite.

Content Title: Excel : Les formules et les fonctions avancées (Microsoft 365)
Content Description: Si vous souhaitez tirer parti de vos données dans Excel, suivez cette formation consacrée aux fonctions et formules avancées. Avec Martial Auroy, vous rafraîchirez vos connaissances sur les données avant de vous lancer dans l'exploitation des dates, des nombres et des textes. Puis, vous aborderez les conditions et la manière de les utiliser au mieux pour vos calculs. Au terme de cette formation, vous aurez acquis des bases solides pour utiliser les formules et les fonctions dans le tableur de Microsoft.

Content Title: Découvrir les métiers du futur
Content Description: Dans cette formation d'Isabelle Rouhan, vous allez découvrir les métiers du futur. Qu'il s'agisse de cybersécurité, de médecine, d'apprentissage, de protection juridique, de stratégie d'entreprise, de commerce, de gestion de projets et de ressources humaines, et de bien d'autres, ces métiers mettent tous en œuvre des concepts résolument modernes et des technologies évoluées. Mais, le plus important, c'est que ces métiers s'adressent à tous et font appel à toutes les compétences, aussi bien humaines que professionnelles.

Content Title: Conducting a SWOT Analysis
Content Description:
Your organization's landscape is constantly changing, as are markets, consumer preferences, and the economy in general. You may have solid plans in place, but when the unexpected strikes, you may be forced to pivot and re-evaluate your options. In this course, innovation and business strategy expert Jim Belfiore shows you how to use the incredibly simple yet powerful SWOT (strengths, weaknesses, opportunities, threats) methodology to evaluate your company’s footing and develop a strategic business plan. Jim shares how to leverage strengths, convert weaknesses, use opportunities, and neutralize threats to bolster your business. In addition, he explains how to use SWOT analysis for personal and organizational growth and drive positive change in yourself and your organization.

This course was created by Madecraft. We are pleased to host this training in our library.

Content Title: L’intelligence artificielle pour les leaders et les managers
Content Description:
L'intelligence artificielle (IA) est en train de révolutionner de nombreux domaines, dont celui du leadership et du management. Comme vous le verrez dans cette formation de Mustapha Kalfate, les leaders peuvent prendre, grâce à l'IA, des décisions plus éclairées, identifier de nouvelles opportunités et gérer leurs équipes de manière plus efficace. Mais cela passe également par la capacité à comprendre et à interpréter judicieusement les données fournies par l'IA, à mettre en place une éthique et à savoir répondre aux attentes parfois excessives des employés et des clients.

Ce cours fait partie d’un certificat professionnel de Microsoft.

Content Title: Internal Interviewing
Content Description: You see a job posting you'd be perfect for and—best of all—it's at your current employer. However, current employees don't always get preferential treatment when it comes to hiring. Learn how to position yourself for a new role and prepare for the process of internal interviewing. Personal brand expert Lida Citroën helps you assess your internal reputation and have a conversation with your current boss about exploring a new job within the company.  She also provides pre-interview research and prep tips, and helps you outline your elevator pitch for the interview. Lastly, she provides guidance on what to do if you do—or don't—get the job.

Content Title: AI in Project Management
Content Description:
Discover how AI can streamline project management in this course led by experts Chris Croft and Dave Birss. Chris brings extensive expertise in project management, while Dave specializes in generative AI, making them the perfect duo to guide you through integrating AI into your project workflows.

This course teaches you how to integrate AI effectively into project planning, enhancing everything from risk assessment to resource allocation. This course covers practical AI applications in project management, demonstrating how it interfaces with management software and improves the estimation of time and costs.

Ideal for project managers eager to incorporate AI into their processes for quicker, more precise planning. You'll start with simple tasks like automating meeting minutes and gradually progress to more complex applications. By the end of this course, you'll be equipped to use AI as a significant asset in your project management toolkit.

This course was created by Chris Croft, Dave Birss, and CRFT Productions. We are pleased to host this training in our library.

Content Title: L'anglais des affaires : Grammaire et vocabulaire des négociations (cours en anglais)
Content Description:
Vous voulez communiquer en anglais avec aisance ? Ce cours vous permet de vous préparer à des négociations en anglais et vous aide à rafraîchir et à approfondir vos connaissances en anglais. Vous apprendrez des modèles de communication immédiatement utilisables ainsi que tous les termes et expressions importants.

Ecoutez et parlez avec les autres - vous apprendrez ainsi rapidement à communiquer avec succès en anglais.

Remarque : ce cours vidéo a été créé par Speexx. Nous sommes heureux de présenter ce contenu dans notre bibliothèque.

Content Title: 30 Practical AI Tips
Content Description: How do you go from using AI to making AI useful to you? That’s what LinkedIn Principal Instructor Morten Rand-Hendriksen set out to find out in this 30 part series, originally published as a daily video and article on LinkedIn. Each video and article covers one practical, actionable, tactical use of AI and gives you all the information you need to try it for yourself. Let’s figure out this AI stuff together!

Content Title: Mener un entretien annuel
Content Description: Dans cette formation qui s'adresse aux managers et aux responsables RH, Camille Lin vous guide à travers toutes les étapes de l’entretien annuel, depuis sa préparation jusqu'à son suivi. Vous apprendrez à distinguer entretien annuel et professionnel, à structurer efficacement vos entretiens pour évaluer les performances et à planifier le développement de vos collaborateurs. Grâce à des techniques de communication adaptées, vous saurez transformer les discussions sensibles en opportunités de progrès. Enfin, vous verrez l'importance du suivi post-entretien pour garantir un impact durable sur la performance globale et le développement professionnel.

Content Title: How to use ChatGPT for Content Creation
Content Description: Among the many uses for AI, did you know you can use it to facilitate content creation? In this course, podcaster and content strategist Nicky Saunders guides you through everything you need to know to start crafting compelling, captivating content. Get an overview of ChatGPT and how to leverage it effectively to enhance your social media presence. Set up your ChatGPT environment and learn best practices. Step through crafting social media posts and curating  visual content with ChatGPT, and then dive into ways ChatGPT can enhance your content planning and strategy. This course empowers you to embrace the future of content creation with ChatGPT.

Content Title: Désamorcer un conflit grâce à l'écoute
Content Description: Dans ce cours audio qui s'adresse aux managers et aux collaborateurs, vous apprendrez à améliorer votre écoute des autres, notamment dans des situations de conflit. En s'appuyant sur des situations vécues en entreprise, Emmanuel Chila vous propose des méthodes simples et de bon sens. Vous apprendrez à éviter les incompréhensions, les irritations les frustrations et à détecter les biais qui peuvent y conduire. Puis, vous verrez comment rester concentré sur les propos tenus par l'autre lors d'un échange, de les clarifier, de les reformuler et de poser les bonnes questions qui vous permettront de construire une relation constructive.

Content Title: What to Do When You’re New (Blinkist Summary)
Content Description:
What to Do When You’re New is the result of Keith Rollag’s 20 years of research on why people become anxious and stressed in new situations. It provides strategies for changing your outlook on new situations and offers techniques for handling them with comfort and confidence. This audio-only summary distills the best tips from Rollag's book. Learn why you're anxious in new situations and discover techniques to become more comfortable, confident, and successful. Get practical advice for introducing yourself, remembering names, asking questions, building new relationships, and more. With these simple mindset shifts, you can be more at ease with the unknown.

Note: This audiobook summary was produced by Blinkist. We are pleased to host this content in our library.

Content Title: Manager ses ex-collègues
Content Description: Manager n'est pas chose facile, mais lorsqu'il s'agit d'anciens collègues, cela peut vite se compliquer. Dans cette formation d'Emmanuel Chila, qui repose sur des expériences réelles vécues en entreprise, vous découvrirez des conseils simples et pratiques pour manager vos anciens collègues avec plus de facilité. Vous aborderez la perception de vos collègues, les craintes et les doutes, les risques de conflits, mais aussi les méthodes qui vous permettront de les valoriser, et de valoriser leur travail, afin d'assoir des relations de confiance, saines et productives.

Content Title: Excel : Les fonctions de recherche croisée (Microsoft 365)
Content Description: Découvrez ce cours sur Excel afin de maîtriser les fonctions de recherche du tableur. Avec Martial Auroy, formateur spécialisé Microsoft 365 et écrivain de livres sur Office 365, vous allez rechercher une valeur dans un tableau ou une liste de cellules afin de l'utiliser dans une formule. Par exemple, vous allez apprendre à rechercher un tarif pour une référence. Vous allez également rechercher une valeur dans un budget, au croisement d'un compte et d'un mois, etc. Puis vous allez voir comment automatiser des données par des recherches et parcourir des listes ainsi que des tableaux facilement.
